question: What is the total amount of filings where the originator bank country is the same as the country of the entity that filed the filing?
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) MATCH (f)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(originator:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(originatorCountry:Country) MATCH (f)<-[:FILED]-(filer:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(filerCountry:Country) WHERE originatorCountry.code = filerCountry.code RETURN sum(f.amount) AS totalAmount
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:ORIGINATOR]->(m0:Entity)-[r1:COUNTRY]->(m1:Country) MATCH (n:Filing)-[r2:FILED]->(m2:Entity)-[r3:COUNTRY]->(m3:Country) WHERE m1 = m3 WITH n RETURN n WHERE n.amount IS NOT NULL RETURN sum(n.amount) }

question: Which organizations have a parent organization that is in the same industry as its subsidiary but operates in a different country?
gold_cypher: MATCH (parent:Organization)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(subsidiary:Organization) MATCH (parent)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(parentIndustry:IndustryCategory) MATCH (subsidiary)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(subsidiaryIndustry:IndustryCategory) WHERE parentIndustry = subsidiaryIndustry MATCH (parent)-[:IN_CITY]->(parentCity:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(parentCountry:Country) MATCH (subsidiary)-[:IN_CITY]->(subsidiaryCity:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(subsidiaryCountry:Country) WHERE parentCountry <> subsidiaryCountry RETURN DISTINCT subsidiary.name AS subsidiaryName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:HAS_PARENT]-(m0:Organization)-[r1:HAS_CATEGORY]->(m1:IndustryCategory),(n:Organization)-[r2:IN_CITY]->(m2:City)-[r3:IN_COUNTRY]->(m3:Country) WHERE m1.name = (SELECT DISTINCT m0.name FROM Organization m0, m0:HAS_CATEGORY->m1 WHERE m0.name = n.name) AND m2.name <> m3.name WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:WROTE]-(m0:Review)-[r1:REVIEWS]->(m1:Business {name: 'Zootown Brew'}) WITH DISTINCT n, m0 RETURN n.name, m0.stars

question: How many 'Software' nodes have a 'Version' with 'name' "7.1"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Software)-[:VERSION]->(v:Version {name: "7.1"}) WITH DISTINCT s RETURN count(s)
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Software)-[r0:VERSION]->(m0:Version {name: '7.1'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Software)-[r1:DEPENDS_ON]->(m1:Version {name: '7.1'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)

question: List all directors who have directed a movie in the 'Sci-Fi' genre.
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre {name: 'Sci-Fi'}) RETURN d
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Director)-[r0:DIRECTED]->(m0:Movie)-[r1:IN_GENRE]->(m1:Genre {name: 'Sci-Fi'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Who are the top 3 actors by number of followers?
gold_cypher: MATCH (actor:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(:Movie) OPTIONAL MATCH (follower:Person)-[:FOLLOWS]->(actor) WITH actor, COUNT(follower) AS followerCount RETURN actor.name AS actorName, followerCount ORDER BY followerCount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n.name ORDER BY size([x IN out[:FOLLOWS] RETURN x]) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which top 5 movies have been rated by more than 500,000 users?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:RATED]-(u:User) WITH m, count(u) AS userCount WHERE userCount > 500000 RETURN m ORDER BY userCount DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:RATED]-(m0:User) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.title, num ORDER BY num DESC WITH DISTINCT n LIMIT 5

question: What are the top 3 languages spoken in movies that have a revenue greater than $100 million?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:SPOKEN_IN_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language) WHERE m.revenue > 100000000 RETURN l.name, COUNT(*) AS movie_count ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Language)<-[r0:SPoken_in_language]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:RATED]->(m1:Movie {revenue: {rev}}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which organizations have more than 100 employees?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization) WHERE o.nbrEmployees > 100 RETURN o
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WHERE n.nbrEmployees > 100 RETURN n.name

question: List the first 3 Interfaces routed by Egress 'DC1-RE'.

question: List the top 5 streams that have the most number of languages associated.

question: Which filings have a beneficiary bank in 'United Kingdom' and an amount greater than 1000000?

question: What are the top 5 directors who have directed the most movies with a runtime under 90 minutes?

question: How many filings are there with an originator bank from 'Singapore' and a beneficiary bank from 'United Kingdom'?

question: List the characters with the lowest 'book45PageRank' values who interacted with "Aemon-Targaryen-(Maester-Aemon)" in book 45.
gold_cypher: MATCH (target:Character {name: "Aemon-Targaryen-(Maester-Aemon)"}) MATCH (target)-[:INTERACTS45]->(other:Character) WITH other ORDER BY other.book45PageRank ASC LIMIT 10 RETURN other.name AS character_name, other.book45PageRank AS page_rank
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:INTERACTS45]->(m0:Character {name: 'Aemon-Targaryen-(Maester-Aemon)'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.book45PageRank ASC LIMIT 10

question: Who are the first 3 board members of organizations based in 'Italy'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(c:Country {name: 'Italy'}) MATCH (o)-[:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]->(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS boardMember LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]-(m0:Organization)-[r1:IN_CITY]->(m1:City {name: 'Italy'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 3

question: List the first 3 organizations that have a CEO and a board member with the same name.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_CEO]->(ceo:Person), (o)-[:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]->(bm:Person) WHERE ceo.name = bm.name RETURN o LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:HAS_CEO]->(m0:Person)-[r1:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]->(m1:Person) WHERE m0.name = m1.name WITH n ORDER BY n.name ASC RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: List the characters whose name starts with 'A'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.name STARTS WITH 'A' RETURN c
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.name STARTS WITH 'A' RETURN n.name

question: Which characters are connected by INTERACTS1 with a weight greater than 200?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c1:Character)-[r:INTERACTS1]->(c2:Character) WHERE r.weight > 200 RETURN c1.name, c2.name, r.weight
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r:INTERACTS1]->(m:Character) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE r.weight > 200 RETURN n.name

question: "provide all possible paths (Node Tags -Relationship Names->Node Tags) connecting IP adresses to exposed ports "
gold_cypher: MATCH path=(interface:Interface)-[:EXPOSES]->(port:Port) RETURN path
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Interface)-[r1:EXPOSES]->(m1:Port)<-[r2:EXPOSES]-(m2:Interface) WITH DISTINCT n, m1, m2 RETURN n.name as start, type(r1) as relation1, m1.name as end, type(r2) as relation2

question: What are the first 3 articles about organizations with a public status?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization {isPublic: true}) RETURN a.title AS article, o.name AS organization ORDER BY a.date DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Article)-[r0:MENTIONS]->(m0:Organization {isPublic: true}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.title ASC LIMIT 3

question: Which orders were placed in the year 1996?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order) WHERE o.orderDate STARTS WITH '1996' RETURN o.orderID AS orderID, o.orderDate AS orderDate
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE toInt(split(n.orderDate, '-')[0]) = 1996 RETURN n.orderID

question: Which category has the most businesses in Missoula?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business {city: "Missoula"})-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:Category) WITH c, count(b) AS businessCount ORDER BY businessCount DESC RETURN c.name AS category, businessCount LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Category)<-[r0:IN_CATEGORY]-(m0:Business {name: 'Missoula Public Library'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name

question: What are the top 3 categories available for businesses?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Category)<-[r0:IN_CATEGORY]-(m0:Business) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 5 organizations that have more than 100 employees and are not dissolved.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization) WHERE o.nbrEmployees > 100 AND o.isDissolved = false RETURN o.name, o.nbrEmployees ORDER BY o.nbrEmployees DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WHERE n.nbrEmployees > 100 AND NOT n.isDissolved RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.nbrEmployees DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which directors were born in the USA?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Director) WHERE d.bornIn = "USA" RETURN d.name, d.born, d.died, d.url, d.imdbId, d.tmdbId
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Director) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.bornIn = 'USA' RETURN n.name

question: What is the `categoryName` with the highest total quantity of units ordered?
gold_cypher: MATCH (:Order)-[o:ORDERS]->(p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH c.categoryName as categoryName, sum(o.quantity) as totalQuantity RETURN categoryName, max(totalQuantity) AS maxTotalQuantity
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Category)<-[r0:PART_OF]-(m0:Product)<-[r1:ORDERS]-(m1:Order) WITH n, sum(r1.quantity) AS total RETURN n.categoryName WITH max(total) AS maxVal RETURN n.categoryName AS categoryName FROM (MATCH (n:Category)<-[r0:PART_OF]-(m0:Product)<-[r1:ORDERS]-(m1:Order) WITH n, sum(r1.quantity) AS total RETURN n.categoryName AS categoryName, total) AS sub1 WHERE sub1.total = maxVal

question: Which actors have played in a movie and also directed a movie?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE exists {   MATCH (a)-[:DIRECTED]->(m2:Movie) } RETURN DISTINCT a.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)-[r0:ACTED_IN]->(m0:Movie)<-[r1:DIRECTED]-(m1:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the first 3 actors who have acted in movies with a revenue of over 500 million USD.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:IN_GENRE]->(m1:Genre {name: 'movie'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE m0.revenue > 500000000 RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 3

question: What are the 3 newest relationships formed in the graph (any type)?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:PRODUCED_BY]->(m0:ProductionCompany {name: 'Pixar Animation Studios'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n

question: "Who is the CEO of Neo4j?"

question: Which 3 customers have ordered the most products in the 'Seafood' category?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(cat:Category {categoryName: "Seafood"}) WITH c, count(p) AS products_ordered ORDER BY products_ordered DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN c.companyName, products_ordered
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Customer)<-[r0:PURCHASED]-(m0:Order)-[r1:ORDERS]->(m1:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(m2:Category {categoryName: 'Seafood'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m1) AS num RETURN n ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the first 3 genres that have more than 50 movies associated with them.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH g, count(m) AS movieCount WHERE movieCount > 50 RETURN g.name AS Genre, movieCount ORDER BY movieCount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Genre)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Movie) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num WHERE num > 50 WITH n ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN DISTINCT n.name

question: Which Filings involve Entities that are linked to the 'CHN' country code?

question: List the top 5 questions with the most favorites that were asked by users with a reputation under 50000.

question: Name 3 people who have the most combined roles across all their ACTED_IN movies.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[a:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WITH p, sum(size(a.roles)) AS totalRoles ORDER BY totalRoles DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN p.name AS PersonName, totalRoles

question: How many languages are used by streams with a total view count over 10 million, listing the first 3?

question: Which businesses have received reviews that indicate a change in quality over time?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:REVIEWS]-(m0:Review)-[r1:REVIEWS]->(m1:Business) WHERE n.name <> m1.name WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)-[r0:ACTED_IN]->(m0:Movie {title: 'Speed Racer'}) WITH DISTINCT n UNWIND r0.roles AS prop RETURN prop

question: What are the top 5 movies with the highest IMDb rating that have been directed by the same director?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:DIRECTED]-(d:Director) WITH d, m ORDER BY m.imdbRating DESC WITH d, collect(m)[0..5] AS topMovies RETURN d.name AS director, [movie IN topMovies | movie.title] AS movies, [movie IN topMovies | movie.imdbRating] AS ratings
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:DIRECTED]-(m0:Director)<-[r1:DIRECTED]-(m1:Movie) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.title, n.imdbRating ORDER BY n.imdbRating DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which 3 users have the highest average favorites on their questions?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WITH u, AVG(q.favorites) AS avgFavorites ORDER BY avgFavorites DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN u.display_name AS UserName, avgFavorites
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:Question) WITH n, avg(r0.favorites) AS avg_fav RETURN n.display_name ORDER BY avg_fav DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which actor has acted in the most movies?
gold_cypher: MATCH (actor:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(movie:Movie) WITH actor, count(movie) AS movieCount ORDER BY movieCount DESC RETURN actor.name, movieCount LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name WITH apoc.cypher.run('MATCH (n:Actor)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 1', {}) AS result RETURN result

question: Which 3 languages are most common in adult films?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Adult)-[:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language) RETURN l.name AS Language, count(a) AS NumberOfAdultFilms ORDER BY NumberOfAdultFilms DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Language)<-[r0:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]-(m0:Adult) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 5 questions with the highest number of downVotes.
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) RETURN q ORDER BY q.downVotes DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n ORDER BY n.downVotes DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which 3 movies have the highest number of actors involved?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(a:Actor) WITH m, COUNT(a) AS actorCount ORDER BY actorCount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, actorCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Actor) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.title ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which supplier supplies the product with the highest unit price?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) WITH p ORDER BY p.unitPrice DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p) RETURN s.companyName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:SUPPLIES]-(m0:Product) WITH n, max(r0.unitPrice) AS maxUnitPrice WHERE n.supplierID = (MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:SUPPLIES]-(m0:Product) RETURN max(r0.unitPrice) AS maxUnitPrice RETURN n.supplierID WHERE maxUnitPrice = maxUnitPrice LIMIT 1 RETURN n.companyName

question: What are the names of officers who have a note on their record in the Panama Papers?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Officer) WHERE o.sourceID = 'Panama Papers' AND o.note IS NOT NULL RETURN o.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Officer) WHERE n.sourceID = 'Panama Papers' AND n.note IS NOT NULL RETURN DISTINCT n.name

question: List the `orderID` and total discount applied to each order.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[rel:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH o, sum(toFloat(rel.unitPrice) * rel.quantity * toFloat(rel.discount)) AS totalDiscount RETURN o.orderID, totalDiscount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Product) WITH n, sum(toInteger(r0.discount)) AS total RETURN n.orderID, total

question: What are the top 3 least voted for movies in the database?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) RETURN m.title, m.votes ORDER BY m.votes LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.votes ASC LIMIT 3

question: Identify the URLs of the top 5 tweets retweeted by 'Neo4j'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (me:Me {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet)<-[:RETWEETS]-(retweet:Tweet) WITH tweet, COUNT(retweet) AS retweet_count ORDER BY retweet_count DESC LIMIT 5 MATCH (tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(link:Link) RETURN link.url
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)<-[r0:RETWEETS]-(m0:Tweet)-[r1:POSTS]->(m1:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.url ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the average number of words in a review?

question: Can you list the names of entities with multiple relationships types like 'same_as' and 'registered_address'?

question: What is the average number of employees for organizations that are headquartered in cities with a population of over 1 million?

question: Identify the top 5 characters with the most interactions in book 3.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)<-[r0:INTERACTS3|INTERACTS2|INTERACTS1|INTERACTS45]-(m0:Character) WITH n, SUM(r0.weight) AS weight RETURN n.name, weight ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 5

question: List all questions with a score of 0 and their associated tags.
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE q.score = 0 RETURN q.title AS question_title, q.text AS question_text, q.link AS question_link, q.createdAt AS created_at, collect(t.name) AS tags
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)-[r0:TAGGED]->(m0:Tag) WITH DISTINCT n, m0 RETURN n, m0 WHERE n.score = 0

question: What is the total number of filings where the originator bank, beneficiary bank, and filer organization are all located in different countries?
gold_cypher: MATCH (filing:Filing) WITH filing MATCH (filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(originatorCountry:Country) MATCH (filing)-[:CONCERNS]->(:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(beneficiaryCountry:Country) MATCH (filing)-[:FILED]->(:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(filerCountry:Country) WHERE originatorCountry.code <> beneficiaryCountry.code AND originatorCountry.code <> filerCountry.code AND beneficiaryCountry.code <> filerCountry.code RETURN count(DISTINCT filing) AS totalFilings
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:ORIGINATOR]->(m0:Entity)-[r1:COUNTRY]->(m1:Country) WITH n, m1 as c0 MATCH (n:Filing)-[r2:CONCERNS]->(m2:Entity)-[r3:COUNTRY]->(m3:Country) WITH n, c0, m3 as c1 MATCH (n:Filing)-[r4:BENEFITS]->(m4:Entity)-[r5:COUNTRY]->(m5:Country) WHERE c0.code <> c1.code AND c1.code <> c5.code AND c0.code <> c5.code RETURN n, c0, c1, c5 } WITH nodes(n) RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Person)-[r0:HAS_PARENT]->(m0:Person {name: 'Julie Spellman Sweet'}) RETURN n as node, m0 as child } WHERE NOT (node:Person)-[r1:HAS_PARENT]->(m1:Person {name: 'Julie Spellman Sweet'}) RETURN DISTINCT node.name

question: Which 5 movies had their entire plot translated into more than one language?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE size(m.languages) > 1 RETURN m.title, m.languages LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE size(n.plot) > 0 RETURN n.title LIMIT 5

question: Which characters have a book45PageRank less than 1?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.book45PageRank < 1 RETURN c.name AS character
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.book45PageRank < 1 RETURN n.name

question: Find all orders shipped to 'France' with a freight cost more than 50.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE o.shipCountry = 'France' AND toFloat(o.freight) > 50 RETURN o.orderID, o.shipName, o.shipCity, o.shipPostalCode, o.shipAddress, o.shipCountry, o.freight
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order) WHERE n.shipCountry = 'France' AND n.freight > '50' RETURN n

question: What is the minimum amount filed by entities located in the country with name "Singapore"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Country {name: "Singapore"})<-[:COUNTRY]-(e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing) WITH min(f.amount) AS minAmount RETURN minAmount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:ORIGINATOR]->(m0:Entity)-[r1:COUNTRY]->(m1:Country {name: 'Singapore'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN min(n.amount)

question: Which 3 categories have the most suppliers?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH c, count(DISTINCT s) AS supplierCount ORDER BY supplierCount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN c.categoryName, supplierCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Category)<-[r0:PART_OF]-(m0:Product)-[r1:SUPPLIES]->(m1:Supplier) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m1) AS num RETURN n.categoryName ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: Show the top 3 users who have asked the most questions about 'apollo'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE t.name = 'apollo' WITH u, count(q) AS questionsAsked ORDER BY questionsAsked DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN u.display_name, questionsAsked
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:Question)-[r1:TAGGED]->(m1:Tag {name: 'apollo'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.order BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the average rating for movies with a tagline longer than 20 characters?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[r:REVIEWED]-() WHERE size(m.tagline) > 20 RETURN avg(r.rating) AS average_rating
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE length(n.tagline) > 20 RETURN avg(n.rating)

question: List the top 3 tweets from users located in 'Graphs Are Everywhere'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {location: 'Graphs Are Everywhere'})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) RETURN t.text, t.favorites ORDER BY t.favorites DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)<-[r0:POSTS]-(m0:User {name: 'Graphs Are Everywhere'}) WITH n ORDER BY n.created_at DESC RETURN n LIMIT 3

question: Who are the first 3 competitors of organizations named 'Accenture'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization {name: "Accenture"})-[:HAS_COMPETITOR]->(competitor:Organization) RETURN competitor.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:HAS_COMPETITOR]-(m0:Organization {name: 'Accenture'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 3

question: Which 3 suppliers have the highest average unit price across their products?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product) WITH s, avg(p.unitPrice) AS avgUnitPrice ORDER BY avgUnitPrice DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN s.companyName AS Supplier, avgUnitPrice AS AverageUnitPrice
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:SUPPLIES]-(m0:Product) WITH n, avg(CAST(m0.unitPrice AS INTEGER)) AS avg RETURN DISTINCT n.name ORDER BY avg DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which 3 genres are most frequently found in movies with a revenue greater than $100 million?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WHERE m.revenue > 100000000 RETURN g.name, count(m) AS movie_count ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Genre)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Movie) WHERE n.name IS NOT NULL AND m0.revenue > 100000000 RETURN n.name WITH DISTINCT n.name ORDER BY count(n) DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the top 3 tags associated with questions having the highest number of comments?
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tag)<-[:TAGGED]-(q:Question) WHERE exists {   (q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(:Comment) } RETURN t.name, count{(q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(:Comment)} AS commentCount ORDER BY commentCount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tag)<-[r0:TAGGED]-(m0:Question)<-[r1:COMMENTED_ON]-(m1:Comment) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m1) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the characters with an INTERACTS2 relationship of weight less than 20.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:INTERACTS2]->(m0:Character) WHERE r0.weight < 20 WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Find the movie with the highest number of votes that has the word "Welcome" in its tagline.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WHERE 'Welcome' IN nodes(n).tagline RETURN n.title WITH DISTINCT n ORDER BY n.votes DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the first 3 organizations that have been mentioned in articles related to environmental issues.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE a.summary CONTAINS "environmental" OR a.title CONTAINS "environmental" RETURN DISTINCT o.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article)-[r1:HAS_CATEGORY]->(m1:IndustryCategory {name: 'environmental issues'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 3

question: What is the date of the review with the lowest star rating for 'Missoula Public Library'?

question: List the top 3 most recent questions asked on the platform.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the total revenue of movies released in the 21st century?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.year >= 2001 RETURN sum(m.revenue) AS totalRevenue
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:IN_GENRE]->(m0:Genre) WHERE n.revenue IS NOT NULL RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Movie)-[r1:DIRECTED]->(m1:Director) WHERE n.revenue IS NOT NULL RETURN n, m1 as m UNION MATCH (n:Movie)-[r2:ACTED_IN]->(m2:Actor) WHERE n.revenue IS NOT NULL RETURN n, m2 as m } WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.revenue IS NOT NULL AND n.year >= 2001 RETURN sum(n.revenue) AS revenue

question: Find the users who have provided answers with a score greater than the average score of all answers.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Answer) WITH avg(a.score) AS average_score MATCH (u:User)-[:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer) WHERE a.score > average_score RETURN DISTINCT u.display_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:PROVIDED]->(m0:Answer) WITH n, avg(m0.score) AS avg_score WHERE r0.score > avg_score RETURN DISTINCT n.display_name

question: Name 3 people who are board members for organizations with a motto.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)<-[:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]-(o:Organization) WHERE o.motto IS NOT NULL RETURN p.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]-(m0:Organization {motto: {motto}}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: Which organizations have been mentioned in the most negative sentiment articles?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE a.sentiment IS NOT NULL WITH o, min(a.sentiment) AS minSentiment, count(a) AS numMentions RETURN o.name AS organization, minSentiment, numMentions ORDER BY minSentiment LIMIT 10
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article {sentiment: 'negative'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC

question: Find the question with the least number of upvotes and a score greater than the average score of questions tagged with 'aws-lambda'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tag {name: 'aws-lambda'})<-[:TAGGED]-(q:Question) WITH avg(q.score) AS average_score MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.score > average_score WITH q ORDER BY q.upVotes ASC RETURN q LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)-[r0:TAGGED]->(m0:Tag {name: 'aws-lambda'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n WHERE n.upVotes = min(n.upVotes) AND n.score > (apoc.cypher.run('MATCH (n:Question)-[r0:TAGGED]->(m0:Tag {name: "aws-lambda"}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.score)', {})[0].value) LIMIT 1

question: Which entities have filed filings where the beneficiary bank is located in a country with a code ending in "M"?

question: Which questions were tagged with 'react-apollo' and have a negative score?

question: Find the characters who have interacted with 'Aegon-I-Targaryen' in any book and have a 'centrality' of 0.0.
gold_cypher: MATCH (aegon:Character {name: 'Aegon-I-Targaryen'}) CALL {   WITH aegon   MATCH (aegon)-[:INTERACTS]->(other)   RETURN other   UNION   WITH aegon   MATCH (aegon)-[:INTERACTS1]->(other)   RETURN other   UNION   WITH aegon   MATCH (aegon)-[:INTERACTS2]->(other)   RETURN other   UNION   WITH aegon   MATCH (aegon)-[:INTERACTS3]->(other)   RETURN other   UNION   WITH aegon   MATCH (aegon)-[:INTERACTS45]->(other)   RETURN other } WITH other WHERE other.centrality = 0.0 RETURN DISTINCT other.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:INTERACTS45]->(m0:Character {name: 'Aegon-I-Targaryen'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.centrality = 0.0 RETURN n.name

question: Which questions have a createdAt date in 2020 and a favorites count of zero?

question: Find the characters with the lowest 'degree' who have interacted with 'Stevron-Frey'.

question: List the top 5 filings where the originator and beneficiary banks are in the same country.

question: What are the first 5 questions where the user who commented also provided an answer?

question: Which director has the highest average IMDB rating for movies with a budget greater than 200 million dollars?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:DIRECTED]-(d:Director) WHERE m.budget > 200000000 WITH d, avg(m.imdbRating) AS averageRating RETURN d.name AS directorName, averageRating ORDER BY averageRating DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Director)<-[r0:DIRECTED]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:RATED]->(m1:Movie {imdbRating: {imdbRating}}) WITH n, avg(r1.rating) AS avg RETURN n.name ORDER BY avg DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the last 3 filings by end date that concerned entities based in 'China'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Country {name: 'China'})<-[:COUNTRY]-(e:Entity)<-[:CONCERNS]-(f:Filing) RETURN f ORDER BY f.end DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:CONCERNS]->(m0:Entity)-[r1:COUNTRY]->(m1:Country {name: 'China'}) WITH n RETURN n.end_date ORDER BY n.end_date DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which 3 categories contain products with no units on order?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WHERE p.unitsOnOrder = 0 RETURN DISTINCT c.categoryName LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Category)<-[r0:PART_OF]-(m0:Product {unitsOnOrder: NULL}) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n.categoryName LIMIT 3

question: List characters whose fastrf_embedding tenth element is less than -0.5.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.fastrf_embedding[9] < -0.5 RETURN c.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.fastrf_embedding[9] < -0.5 RETURN n.name

question: List the top 3 suppliers with the most products in the 'Beverages' category.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category {categoryName: 'Beverages'}) WITH s, count(p) as productCount ORDER BY productCount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN s.companyName AS supplierName, productCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:SUPPLIES]-(m0:Product)-[r1:PART_OF]->(m1:Category {name: 'Beverages'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which business located on 'E Front St' has the highest average star rating?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(:Category), (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b) WHERE b.address CONTAINS 'E Front St' WITH b, avg(r.stars) AS avgRating RETURN b.name AS businessName, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:REVIEWS]-(m0:Review) WITH n, avg(r0.stars) AS avg RETURN DISTINCT n.name, n.address WHERE n.address = '201 E Front St' ORDER BY avg DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the first 3 entities that have filed the most transactions with a beneficiary in 'China'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(b:Entity) WHERE b.country = 'China' WITH e, count(f) AS transactions ORDER BY transactions DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN e
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:FILED]-(m0:Filing)-[r1:BENEFITS]->(m1:Entity {name: 'China'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many characters have a degree value equal to 0.0?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.degree = 0.0 RETURN count(c)
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Character) WHERE n.degree = 0.0 RETURN n as n } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)

question: Which routers connect to interfaces with IP addresses in the 10.2 range?
gold_cypher: MATCH (r:Router)-[:ROUTES]->(i:Interface) WHERE i.ip STARTS WITH '10.2' RETURN r.name AS RouterName, i.ip AS InterfaceIP
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Router)-[r0:ROUTES]->(m0:Interface {ip: '10.2.*'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the first 3 movies where the main language is not English but have an IMDb rating over 7.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.languages[0] <> 'English' AND m.imdbRating > 7 RETURN m.title, m.languages[0], m.imdbRating ORDER BY m.imdbRating DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WHERE NOT 'English' IN n.languages AND n.imdbRating > 7 WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.title LIMIT 3

question: Name the top 5 most popular movies in the 'Science Fiction' genre.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre {name: 'Science Fiction'}) RETURN m.title, m.popularity ORDER BY m.popularity DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:IN_GENRE]->(m0:Genre {name: 'Science Fiction'}) WITH n ORDER BY n.popularity DESC RETURN DISTINCT n.title LIMIT 5

question: What is the total number of movies released in each year?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WITH date(m.release_date).year AS releaseYear, count(m) AS movieCount RETURN releaseYear, movieCount ORDER BY releaseYear
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.release_date IS NOT NULL RETURN n.release_date AS release_date } WITH [release_date] AS release_dates UNWIND release_dates AS release_date MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:RELEASED_IN]->(m0:Movie) WHERE m0.release_date = release_date RETURN sum(1) AS number, release_date

question: Show the first 5 questions where the title contains the word 'update'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.title CONTAINS 'update' RETURN q ORDER BY q.creation_date ASC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n LIMIT 5

question: List the "sourceID" values of all relationships connected to Entities with a "struck_off_date" before 2010.
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.struck_off_date < '2010' WITH e MATCH (e)-[r]->() RETURN DISTINCT r.sourceID UNION MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.struck_off_date < '2010' WITH e MATCH (e)<-[r]-() RETURN DISTINCT r.sourceID
pred_cypher: MATCH (n)-[r:registered_address | intermediary_of | officer_of | connected_to | similar | same_as | same_company_as | same_name_as]->(m:Entity {struck_off_date: {struck_off_date}}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.sourceID

question: Which person produced movies directed by Lana Wachowski?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person {name: "Lana Wachowski"})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) MATCH (producer:Person)-[:PRODUCED]->(m) RETURN DISTINCT producer.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:PRODUCED]-(m0:Movie)<-[r1:DIRECTED]-(m1:Person {name: 'Lana Wachowski'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the first 3 tweets by 'neo4j' that have been tagged with a hashtag and mention another user.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) MATCH (t)-[:TAGS]->(h:Hashtag) MATCH (t)-[:MENTIONS]->(m:User) RETURN t.id_str AS tweet_id, t.text AS tweet_text, t.created_at AS created_at ORDER BY t.created_at ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)-[r0:TAGS]->(m0:Hashtag), (n:Tweet)-[r1:MENTIONS]->(m1:User) WHERE n.text CONTAINS 'neo4j' WITH n ORDER BY n.created_at DESC RETURN n.text LIMIT 3

question: Find characters that have 'INTERACTS1' relationship with a weight above 250.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character)-[r:INTERACTS1]->(:Character) WHERE r.weight > 250 RETURN c
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r:INTERACTS1]->(m:Character) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE r.weight > 250 RETURN n.name

question: List the top 3 people who have the most credits as a producer.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:CREW_FOR]->(m:Movie) WHERE r.job = 'Producer' RETURN p.name, count(r) AS credits ORDER BY credits DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)-[r0:CREW_FOR]->(m0:Movie {name: 'The Man with the Golden Gun'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Person)-[r1:CREW_FOR]->(m1:Movie) WHERE r1.job = 'Producer' WITH n, count(DISTINCT m1) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the descriptions of streams that play 'Call of Duty: Warzone'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game {name: 'Call of Duty: Warzone'}) RETURN s.description AS StreamDescription
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:PLAYS]->(m0:Game {name: 'Call of Duty: Warzone'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.description

question: Which movies have been produced by more than one person?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PRODUCED]->(m:Movie) WITH m, count(p) AS producers_count WHERE producers_count > 1 RETURN m.title AS Movie, producers_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:PRODUCED]-(m0:Person), (n:Movie)<-[r1:PRODUCED]-(m1:Person) WHERE id(m0) <> id(m1) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n.title

question: What is the average number of Interfaces per Switch?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Switch)-[:ROUTES]->(i:Interface) WITH s, count(i) AS interfaceCount RETURN avg(interfaceCount) AS averageInterfacesPerSwitch
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Switch)<-[r0:CONNECTS]-(m0:Interface) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN avg(num)

question: Identify all orders shipped to 'France' and have a 'shipVia' of 1.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order) WHERE o.shipCountry = 'France' AND o.shipVia = '1' RETURN o.orderID, o.shipName, o.shipCity, o.shipPostalCode, o.shipAddress, o.shipCountry, o.shipVia
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order)-[r0:ORDERS]->(m0:Product) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Order)-[r1:ORDERS]->(m1:Product) WHERE n.shipCountry = 'France' AND n.shipVia = '1' WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n

question: List the "countries" values of all Entities that are linked to an Intermediary with the "name" value containing "LOYAL".
gold_cypher: MATCH (i:Intermediary)-[:intermediary_of]->(e:Entity) WHERE i.name CONTAINS 'LOYAL' RETURN DISTINCT e.countries
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:intermediary_of]-(m0:Intermediary) WHERE m0.name CONTAINS 'LOYAL' WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.countries

question: List all organizations that have been mentioned in articles with a negative sentiment.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE a.sentiment < 0 RETURN o.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article {sentiment: 'negative'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Show the top 5 most recently edited addresses.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Address) RETURN a.address, a.lastEditTimestamp ORDER BY a.lastEditTimestamp DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Address) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.lastEditTimestamp DESC LIMIT 5

question: "Which 3 users get the most retweets?"
gold_cypher: MATCH (:User)-[r:RETWEETS]->(t:Tweet) RETURN t.id AS TweetID, COUNT(r) AS RetweetCount ORDER BY RetweetCount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User) RETURN n.name WITH DISTINCT n ORDER BY n.followers DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the top 5 most frequently ordered products by customers from 'USA'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {country: 'USA'})-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) RETURN p.productName, count(o) AS ordersCount ORDER BY ordersCount DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Order)<-[r1:PURCHASED]-(m1:Customer {name: 'USA'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.productName, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: List all characters with a centrality of 1.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.centrality = 1.0 RETURN c.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.centrality = 1 RETURN n.name

question: What is the total revenue of all organizations that are mentioned in articles published after 2022-01-01?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE a.date > datetime('2022-01-01T00:00:00Z') WITH sum(o.revenue) AS totalRevenue RETURN totalRevenue
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article {name: 'Article'}) WHERE m0.date > '2022-01-01' WITH n RETURN n.revenue as revenue UNION MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article {name: 'Article'}) WHERE m0.date > '2022-01-01' WITH n RETURN n.revenue as revenue } WITH reduce(sum = 0.0, x IN cases | sum + x) as total RETURN total

question: List the businesses that have a review mentioning 'breakfast'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WHERE r.text CONTAINS 'breakfast' RETURN b.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:REVIEWS]-(m0:Review) WHERE 'breakfast' IN lower(m0.text) RETURN DISTINCT n.name

question: List the first 3 genres most commonly found in videos.
gold_cypher: MATCH (v:Video)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH g, count(v) AS videoCount ORDER BY videoCount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN g.name AS genre, videoCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Genre)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Video) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the labels of users with an area less than 2 and a size greater than 1.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.area < 2 AND u.size > 1 RETURN u.label
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.area < 2 AND n.size > 1 RETURN n.label

question: Which supplier (`supplierID`) supplies the product with the highest `unitPrice`?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product)-[:SUPPLIES]-(s:Supplier) RETURN s.supplierID, p.productName, p.unitPrice ORDER BY p.unitPrice DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)-[r0:SUPPLIES]->(m0:Supplier) WITH n, m0 RETURN DISTINCT n.supplierID ORDER BY n.unitPrice DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which organizations are mentioned in articles with a sentiment score greater than 0.8?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE a.sentiment > 0.8 RETURN o.name AS OrganizationName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article {name: 'sentiment score > 0.8'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the first 3 genres associated with movies that have been rated by at least 5 different users?
gold_cypher: MATCH (g:Genre)<-[:IN_GENRE]-(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(u:User) WITH g, m, count(DISTINCT u) AS userCount WHERE userCount >= 5 RETURN g.name AS genre ORDER BY userCount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Genre)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Movie)<-[r1:RATED]-(m1:User) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 3

question: Who are the CEOs of organizations located in Seattle?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(:City {name: 'Seattle'}) MATCH (o)-[:HAS_CEO]->(ceo:Person) RETURN o.name AS organization, ceo.name AS ceo
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)-[r0:HAS_PARENT]->(m0:Person {name: 'CEO'})<-[:HAS_CEO]-(m1:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(m2:City {name: 'Seattle'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What characters have interacted with "Cersei-Lannister" in book 45?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character {name: "Cersei-Lannister"})-[:INTERACTS45 {book: 45}]-(other) RETURN other.name AS character_name

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WHERE n.centrality = 0.0 AND n.degree > 20 RETURN n.name

question: List the first 5 streams where the user and moderator have the same name.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(u:User) WHERE s.name = u.name RETURN s LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:MODERATOR]->(m0:User)<-[r1:MODERATOR]-(m1:Stream) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name LIMIT 5

question: List the actors who have worked in movies with a runtime over 3 hours.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:CAST_FOR]-(m0:Movie) WHERE m0.runtime > 3.0 * 60 RETURN DISTINCT n.name

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:DataCenter)-[r0:CONTAINS]->(m0:Router {name: 'DC1-R-2'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the organizations that have more than one subsidiary.
gold_cypher: MATCH (parentOrg:Organization)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(subOrg:Organization) WITH parentOrg, COUNT(subOrg) AS numSubsidiaries WHERE numSubsidiaries > 1 RETURN parentOrg.name AS OrganizationName, numSubsidiaries
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]-(m0:Organization) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name WHERE num > 1

question: What are the top 3 oldest movies in the database?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.year ASC LIMIT 3

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0: FOLLOWS]->(m0:User {name: 'neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.profile_image_url

question: List officers who are connected to addresses in Apia, Samoa.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Officer)-[r0:connected_to]->(m0:Address {country: 'Apia, Samoa'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Identify the first 3 tweets mentioning 'Neo4j' that also tag a hashtag and were created in 2021.
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(u:User {name: 'Neo4j'}), (t)-[:TAGS]->(h:Hashtag) WHERE t.created_at >= datetime('2021-01-01T00:00:00Z') AND t.created_at <= datetime('2021-12-31T23:59:59Z') RETURN t LIMIT 3

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Application)-[r0:DEPENDS_ON]->(m0:Process {name: '8966'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Comment {uuid: 122427099}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.score

question: Find entities that are of the type 'FOREIGN FORMED CORPORATION'.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.type = 'FOREIGN FORMED CORPORATION' RETURN n

question: List the top 5 streams based on their creation date.

question: Find the top 3 officers based on the number of entities they are connected to.

question: List the actors who have worked in movies with a budget over $100 million.

question: What is the average score of comments made by users who also asked questions?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(:Question) WITH u MATCH (u)-[:COMMENTED]->(c:Comment) RETURN avg(c.score) AS average_score
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Comment)<-[r0:COMMENTED_ON]-(m0:Question)<-[r1:ASKED]-(m1:User) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.score)

question: List the top 5 orders with the highest freight costs.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order) RETURN o.orderID, o.freight ORDER BY toFloat(o.freight) DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.freight DESC LIMIT 5

question: Identify streams that have moderators who are also VIPs.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)<-[:MODERATOR]-(m:User)-[:VIP]->(s) RETURN s.name AS stream, m.name AS moderator_and_vip
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:MODERATOR]->(m0:User)-[r1:VIP]->(m1:User) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n

question: List the top 5 tweets that include a link and were posted by users following 'Neo4j'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (me:Me {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:FOLLOWS]->(user:User)-[:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(link:Link) RETURN tweet.text AS tweet_text, tweet.created_at AS created_at, link.url AS link_url ORDER BY tweet.created_at DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)-[r0:CONTAINS]->(m0:Link)<-[r1:POSTS]-(m1:User)<-[r2:FOLLOWS]-(m2:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH n ORDER BY n.favorites DESC RETURN n LIMIT 5

question: What is the 'ip' address of the 'Interface' connected to the 'Egress' node?
gold_cypher: MATCH (egress:Egress)-[:ROUTES]->(interface:Interface) RETURN interface.ip
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Interface)<-[r0:ROUTES]-(m0:Egress) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.ip

question: Which 3 products have the highest discount in orders?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product)<-[:ORDERS]-(o:Order) WITH p, o ORDER BY o.discount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN p.productName AS productName, o.discount AS discount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Order) WITH n, max(toFloat(r0.discount)) AS max_discount RETURN DISTINCT n.productName ORDER BY max_discount DESC LIMIT 3

question: List all movies where the same person has acted and produced.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie), (p)-[:PRODUCED]->(m) RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, m.released AS ReleaseYear
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Person)-[r1:PRODUCED]->(m1:Movie) WHERE n.title = m1.title RETURN DISTINCT n.title as title }

question: List the top 5 directors by number of movies directed in the 1990s.
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.year >= 1990 AND m.year < 2000 WITH d, count(m) AS moviesDirected ORDER BY moviesDirected DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN d.name, moviesDirected
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Director)-[r0:DIRECTED]->(m0:Movie) WHERE m0.year >= 1990 AND m0.year <= 1999 WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the first 3 articles mentioning organizations with a revenue less than 5 million.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.revenue < 5000000 RETURN a.title, a.summary, a.date LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Article)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Organization) WHERE n.id IS NOT NULL AND m0.revenue < 5000000 WITH n RETURN n ORDER BY n.title ASC LIMIT 3

question: List the distinct "jurisdiction" values of Entities that are connected to Officers who also have an "officer_of" relationship with an Other node.
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-->(o:Officer)-[:officer_of]->(other:Other) RETURN DISTINCT e.jurisdiction
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:connected_to]-(m0:Officer)-[r1:officer_of]->(m1:Other) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN DISTINCT n.jurisdiction

question: Which organizations based in 'United States of America' have a public status and more than 1000 employees?
gold_cypher: MATCH (org:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(city:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(country:Country {name: "United States of America"}) WHERE org.isPublic = true AND org.nbrEmployees > 1000 RETURN org.name, org.nbrEmployees
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WHERE n.isPublic AND n.nbrEmployees > 1000 AND n.name IN NODES((n)-[:IN_CITY]->(:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(:Country {name: 'United States of America'})) RETURN n.name

question: What is the average start time of all the Services?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Service)  WITH avg(s.startTime) AS averageStartTime RETURN averageStartTime
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Service) RETURN n as node LIMIT 1000 } WITH node UNWIND node.startTime AS prop RETURN avg(prop) AS avg

question: Which organizations are based in cities not in the 'United States of America'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(country:Country) WHERE country.name <> 'United States of America' RETURN o
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:IN_CITY]->(m0:City)-[r1:IN_COUNTRY]->(m1:Country {name: 'United States of America'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE NOT m1 IS NOT NULL RETURN n.name

question: What is the average `quantity` ordered for products in the 'Dairy Products' category?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Category {categoryName: 'Dairy Products'})-[:PART_OF]->(p:Product) WITH avg(p.unitsOnOrder) AS averageQuantity RETURN averageQuantity
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Product)-[r1:PART_OF]->(m1:Category {name: 'Dairy Products'}) WITH n RETURN avg(n.quantity)

question: List the display names of users who have asked questions tagged "neo4j".
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tag {name: 'neo4j'})<-[:TAGGED]-(q:Question)<-[:ASKED]-(u:User) RETURN DISTINCT u.display_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:ASKED]->(m0:Question)-[r1:TAGGED]->(m1:Tag {name: 'neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.display_name

question: Which adult films have been produced by companies not based in the USA?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Adult)-[:PRODUCED_BY]->(c:ProductionCompany) WHERE NOT EXISTS { (c)-[:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(:Country {name: 'United States of America'}) } RETURN a.title AS Adult_Film, c.name AS Production_Company
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Adult) OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[r0:PRODUCED_BY]->(m0:ProductionCompany)-[r1:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(m1:Country {name: 'United States of America'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.title, num

question: Show the first 3 questions asked by a user with a reputation over 2000.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE u.reputation > 2000 RETURN q.title, q.link, q.createdAt ORDER BY q.createdAt LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:User) WHERE n.reputation > 2000 WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.text ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which user has asked a question with the tag "neo4j" and has a display name that starts with "M"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE t.name = "neo4j" AND u.display_name STARTS WITH "M" RETURN u.display_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:ASKED]->(m0:Question)-[r1:TAGGED]->(m1:Tag {name: 'neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.display_name STARTS WITH 'M' RETURN n.display_name

question: Which businesses in 'CA' have a 'Coffee' category and what are their review ratings?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:Category {name: 'Coffee'}) WHERE b.state = 'CA' MATCH (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b) RETURN b.name, b.address, r.stars
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)-[r0:IN_CATEGORY]->(m0:Category {name: 'Coffee'}) WHERE n.state = 'CA' WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.state

question: Find the top 5 tweets by 'Neo4j' that contain the hashtag '#education'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet)-[:TAGS]->(h:Hashtag {name: 'education'}) RETURN t.text, t.favorites, t.created_at ORDER BY t.favorites DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)-[r0:TAGS]->(m0:Hashtag {name: '#education'}) WITH n ORDER BY n.favorites DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN n

question: Which actors have acted in movies directed by Harold Lloyd?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Director {name: "Harold Lloyd"})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m) RETURN DISTINCT a.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie)<-[r1:DIRECTED]-(m1:Director {name: 'Harold Lloyd'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List all officers from South Korea.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Officer {countries: "South Korea"}) RETURN o
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Officer) WHERE n.countries = 'South Korea' WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the total revenue generated by movies directed by directors born in 'Burchard, Nebraska, USA'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WHERE d.bornIn = 'Burchard, Nebraska, USA' RETURN SUM(m.revenue) AS totalRevenue
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:DIRECTED]-(m0:Director {bornIn: 'Burchard, Nebraska, USA'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN sum(n.revenue)

question: List the characters with the lowest `centrality` that interact with "Brynden-Tully" in any book.
gold_cypher: MATCH (bt:Character {name: "Brynden-Tully"}) WITH bt MATCH (bt)-[:INTERACTS*1..5]->(other) RETURN other.name, other.centrality  ORDER BY other.centrality ASC
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:INTERACTS45|INTERACTS1|INTERACTS2|INTERACTS3]->(m0:Character {name: 'Brynden-Tully'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.centrality ASC LIMIT 10

question: Find characters with a centrality below 0.2 and a book45PageRank above 3.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.centrality < 0.2 AND c.book45PageRank > 3 RETURN c.name, c.centrality, c.book45PageRank
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.centrality < 0.2 AND n.book45PageRank > 3 RETURN n.name

question: "What percentage of all actors in the database have acted in more than one movie?"
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WITH p, count(m) AS movies_count WHERE movies_count > 1 WITH count(p) AS actors_more_than_one_movie MATCH (actor:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(:Movie) WITH count(DISTINCT actor) AS total_actors, actors_more_than_one_movie RETURN (actors_more_than_one_movie * 1.0) / total_actors * 100 AS percentage
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie) RETURN n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num } WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN (count(CASE WHEN num > 1 THEN n END) * 100.0 / count(DISTINCT n)) AS percentage

question: Find the first 3 questions with no answers.
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.answer_count = 0 RETURN q ORDER BY q.creation_date ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE size((n)-[r0:ANSWERED]->()) = 0 RETURN n ORDER BY n.creation_date ASC LIMIT 3

question: What is the total number of reviews written by each user?
gold_cypher: MATCH (user:User)-[:WROTE]->(review:Review) WITH user, count(review) AS reviewCount RETURN user.name AS userName, reviewCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:WROTE]-(m0:Review) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num

question: Find the characters who interacted with 'Jaime-Lannister' in 'INTERACTS3' relationship.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character { name: 'Jaime-Lannister' })-[:INTERACTS3]->(other:Character) RETURN other.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:INTERACTS3]->(m0:Character {name: 'Jaime-Lannister'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Find the top 5 movies with the lowest ratings in REVIEWS.
gold_cypher: MATCH (:Person)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) RETURN m.title AS movie, AVG(r.rating) AS average_rating ORDER BY average_rating ASC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:REVIEWED]-(m0:Person) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.title, num ORDER BY num ASC LIMIT 5

question: Who has produced and written the same movie?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PRODUCED]->(m:Movie)<-[:WROTE]-(p) RETURN p.name AS person, m.title AS movie
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:PRODUCED]-(m:Movie)<-[r1:WROTE]-(m1:Person) WHERE n.name <> m1.name WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the names of products with a reorder level greater than the average reorder level of all products?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) WITH AVG(p.reorderLevel) AS avgReorderLevel MATCH (p2:Product) WHERE p2.reorderLevel > avgReorderLevel RETURN p2.productName AS ProductName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.reorderLevel > (MATCH (n0:Product) RETURN AVG(n0.reorderLevel) AS avgReorderLevel) RETURN n.productName

question: List the first 5 Entities that share the same registered address as an entity with the jurisdiction "SAM".
gold_cypher: MATCH (e1:Entity {jurisdiction: 'SAM'})-[:registered_address]->(addr:Address) MATCH (e2:Entity)-[:registered_address]->(addr) WHERE e1 <> e2 RETURN DISTINCT e2.name LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)-[r0:registered_address]->(m0:Address)<-[r1:registered_address]-(m1:Entity {jurisdiction: 'SAM'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name LIMIT 5

question: Which products are part of the 'Desserts, candies, and sweet breads' category and have a 'unitsOnOrder' above 5?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category {description: 'Desserts, candies, and sweet breads'}) WHERE p.unitsOnOrder > 5 RETURN p.productName, p.unitsOnOrder
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)-[r0:PART_OF]->(m0:Category {name: 'Desserts, candies, and sweet breads'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.unitsOnOrder > 5 RETURN n.name

question: List all the answers provided by the user with UUID 16922964.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {uuid: 16922964})-[:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer) RETURN a
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Answer)<-[r0:PROVIDED]-(m0:User {uuid: 16922964}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.body_markdown

question: List the top 5 tweets that have been retweeted the most times.
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(retweet:Tweet) RETURN t.text AS tweet_text, count(retweet) AS retweet_count ORDER BY retweet_count DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet) WITH n RETURN n ORDER BY n.retweet_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the first 3 hashtags appearing in the latest tweets by 'Neo4j'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet)-[:TAGS]->(h:Hashtag) WITH t, h ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN h.name AS hashtag
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Hashtag)<-[r0:TAGS]-(m0:Tweet)<-[r1:POSTS]-(m1:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n ORDER BY n.name ASC RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: What are the first 3 movies that have a budget exactly 50 million USD?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.budget = 50000000 RETURN m.title LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.budget = 50000000 RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.title ASC LIMIT 3

question: Name the streams that have a user named 'itsbigchase' as a moderator.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(u:User {name: 'itsbigchase'}) RETURN s.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:MODERATOR]->(m0:User {name: 'itsbigchase'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which adult films are associated with the genre 'Horror'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Adult)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre {name: 'Horror'}) RETURN a.title
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Adult)-[r0:IN_GENRE]->(m0:Genre {name: 'Horror'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.title

question: What are the top 5 games played by streams created before 2015?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) WHERE s.createdAt < datetime('2015-01-01T00:00:00Z') RETURN g.name AS game, COUNT(s) AS stream_count ORDER BY stream_count DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Game)<-[r0:PLAYS]-(m0:Stream)-[r1:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(m1:Language {name: 'en'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which businesses have a user review mentioning 'comfortable places'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review)-[:WROTE]->(u:User) WHERE r.text CONTAINS 'comfortable places' RETURN b.name, b.address, b.city, b.state
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:Review]-(m0:Review)-[r1:WROTE]->(m1:User) WHERE 'comfortable places' IN split(m0.text, ' ') WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the names of all directors in the database.
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Director) RETURN DISTINCT d.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Director) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the first 3 characters with the lowest `centrality`.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) RETURN c.name, c.centrality ORDER BY c.centrality ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.centrality ASC LIMIT 3

question: "Which stream has the most moderators and VIPs among its chatters?"
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:CHATTER|MODERATOR|VIP]->(u) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS influence_count RETURN s.id, s.name, influence_count ORDER BY influence_count DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream) WITH n, count(DISTINCT n.MODERATOR) AS num1, count(DISTINCT n.VIP) AS num2 RETURN n.name, num1 + num2 ORDER BY num1 + num2 DESC LIMIT 1

question: Identify the first 3 streams that have chatters who are streams created before 2017.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(c:Stream) WHERE c.createdAt < datetime('2017-01-01T00:00:00Z') RETURN s LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)<-[r0:CHATTER]-(m0:Stream) WHERE n.createdAt < datetime('2017-01-01 00:00:00') WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 3

question: Which 3 organizations have the most negative sentiment in recent articles?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE a.sentiment < 0 WITH o, avg(a.sentiment) AS avgSentiment ORDER BY avgSentiment LIMIT 3 RETURN o.name AS organization, avgSentiment
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article) WHERE r0.sentiment < 0 RETURN n.name ORDER BY count(DISTINCT m0) DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 3 movies with a significant plot twist mentioned in the plot.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.plot CONTAINS 'twist' RETURN m.title, m.plot ORDER BY m.imdbRating DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:IN_GENRE]->(m0:Genre {name: 'plot twist'}) WITH n RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.title DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which 5 actors were born in the USA and have acted in at least two movies?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE a.bornIn = 'USA' WITH a, count(m) AS numMovies WHERE numMovies >= 2 RETURN a.name, a.bornIn, numMovies ORDER BY numMovies DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor) WHERE n.bornIn = 'USA' WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n.name LIMIT 5

question: How many entities have a struck_off_date in 2013?
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.struck_off_date CONTAINS '2013' WITH count(DISTINCT e) AS count RETURN count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.struck_off_date CONTAINS '2013' RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: Show the top 5 users that 'Neo4j' interacts with based on the number of interactions.

question: What are the names of users who have moderated other users?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:MODERATOR]->(m0:User) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the employeeID associated with the order with the highest freight cost?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.employeeID ORDER BY n.freight DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which businesses have received reviews with texts containing the word 'IPA'?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:SUPPLIES]-(m0:Product {discontinued: true}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n

question: List the top 3 production companies with the highest average movie revenue.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:ProductionCompany)<-[r0:PRODUCED_BY]-(m0:Movie) WITH n, avg(m0.revenue) AS avg RETURN n.name ORDER BY avg DESC LIMIT 3

question: Name the first 3 CEOs of organizations that are headquartered in a city starting with 'S'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City), (o)-[:HAS_CEO]->(ceo:Person) WHERE c.name STARTS WITH 'S' RETURN ceo.name AS CEO_Name, o.name AS Organization_Name, c.name AS City_Name LIMIT 3

question: What are the first 3 recent movies directed by directors born after 1970?

question: List the questions asked by the user with id 10251021.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:User {id: 10251021}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.text

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Genre {name: 'Sci-Fi'}) WITH n RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.title DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which 3 users have moderated the most streams and users combined?

question: What are the names of the first 3 products that have never been ordered?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE NOT exists{ (p)-[:ORDERS]->(:Order) } RETURN p.productName LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Order) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n.productName ORDER BY n.productName ASC LIMIT 3

question: Which users commented on the top 5 most viewed questions?
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WITH q ORDER BY q.view_count DESC LIMIT 5 MATCH (u:User)-[:COMMENTED]->(c:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(q) RETURN DISTINCT u.display_name AS user, q.title AS question_title, q.view_count AS views ORDER BY views DESC
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:COMMENTED]->(m0:Comment)-[r1:COMMENTED_ON]->(m1:Question)<-[r2:TAGGED]-(m2:Tag) WITH n, m1 ORDER BY m1.view_count DESC RETURN DISTINCT n.display_name LIMIT 5

question: Which entities are connected to addresses in Hong Kong?
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:registered_address]->(a:Address) WHERE a.countries = "Hong Kong" RETURN e.name AS entity_name, a.address AS address
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:connected_to]-(m0:Address {name: 'Hong Kong'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the first 5 movies rated by user with ID 1?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {id: 1})-[:RATED]->(m:Movie) RETURN m LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:RATED]-(m0:User {id: 1}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.title LIMIT 5

question: What is the average score of comments associated with questions tagged 'cypher'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tag {name: 'cypher'}) MATCH (t)<-[:TAGGED]-(q:Question) MATCH (q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(c:Comment) WITH avg(c.score) AS average_score RETURN average_score
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Comment)-[r0:COMMENTED_ON]->(m0:Question)-[r1:TAGGED]->(m1:Tag {name: 'cypher'}) WITH n RETURN avg(n.score)

question: Name the top 3 organizations with the most subsidiaries according to the database.
gold_cypher: MATCH (parent:Organization)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(subsidiary:Organization) WITH parent, COUNT(subsidiary) AS subsidiaryCount RETURN parent.name AS organizationName, subsidiaryCount ORDER BY subsidiaryCount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]-(m0:Organization) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which organizations are mentioned in articles authored by 'David Correa'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article {author: "David Correa"})-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) RETURN o.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article {author: 'David Correa'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the names and URLs of the first 3 streams that are part of a team created before 2015?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(t:Team) WHERE t.createdAt < datetime('2015-01-01T00:00:00Z') RETURN s.name, s.url LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:HAS_TEAM]->(m0:Team {name: 'ESO Stream Team'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.url ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 5 entities that have been concerned in filings the most.
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:CONCERNS]->(f:Filing) RETURN e.name, count(f) AS filings_count ORDER BY filings_count DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:CONCERS]-(m0:Filing) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: Identify the top 3 filings where the originator bank and the beneficiary bank are located at the same latitude.
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.origin_lat = f.beneficiary_lat RETURN f ORDER BY f.amount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:ORIGINATOR]->(m0:Entity)-[r1:COUNTRY]->(m1:Country), (n:Filing)-[r2:FILED]->(m2:Entity)-[r3:COUNTRY]->(m3:Country) WITH n, m1, m3 WHERE n.origin_lat = m1.location.y AND n.beneficiary_lat = m3.location.y RETURN n.id ORDER BY n.id DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the name of the actor who acted in the movie "Toy Story"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie {title: "Toy Story"})<-[:ACTED_IN]-(a:Actor) RETURN a.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie {name: 'Toy Story'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the names of the top 3 suppliers based on the average freight of orders they supplied?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product)<-[:ORDERS]-(o:Order) WITH s, o.freight AS freight WHERE freight IS NOT NULL WITH s, avg(toFloat(freight)) AS avgFreight ORDER BY avgFreight DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN s.companyName AS supplierName, avgFreight
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:SUPPLIES]-(m0:Product)<-[r1:ORDERS]-(m1:Order) WITH n, avg(toInteger(r1.freight)) AS avg_freight RETURN DISTINCT n.companyName ORDER BY avg_freight DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the actors who have acted in movies directed by both Lilly Wachowski and Lana Wachowski.
gold_cypher: MATCH (lilly:Person {name: 'Lilly Wachowski'})-[:DIRECTED]->(lillyMovies:Movie) MATCH (lana:Person {name: 'Lana Wachowski'})-[:DIRECTED]->(lanaMovies:Movie) MATCH (lillyMovies)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(lillyActors:Person) MATCH (lanaMovies)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(lanaActors:Person) WITH lillyActors, lanaActors WHERE id(lillyActors) = id(lanaActors) RETURN DISTINCT lillyActors.name AS actorName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie)<-[r1:DIRECTED]-(m1:Person {name: 'Lilly Wachowski'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.name IN [x FOR x IN nodes((n:Person)-[r:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[r1:DIRECTED]-(m1:Person {name: 'Lana Wachowski'}) RETURN x.name] RETURN n.name

question: List the names of the organizations that are not mentioned in any articles.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization) WHERE NOT EXISTS {   MATCH (:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o) } RETURN o.name AS organizationName
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Organization) OPTIONAL MATCH (m:Article)-[r0:MENTIONS]->(n:Organization) WHERE r0 IS NOT NULL RETURN n, count(DISTINCT m) AS num RETURN n.name AS name, num } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN name WHERE num IS NULL

question: What are the original titles of movies that have been translated into Spanish?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:SPOKEN_IN_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language {name: 'Spanish'}) RETURN m.original_title AS OriginalTitle
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]->(m0:Language {name: 'Spanish'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.original_title

question: Which 5 movies have been rated exactly 5 times by users?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:RATED]-(u:User) WITH m, COUNT(u) AS ratingCount WHERE ratingCount = 5 RETURN m.title AS movieTitle LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:RATED]-(m0:User) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.title, num WHERE num = 5 ORDER BY n.title ASC LIMIT 5

question: Show the top 3 movies with the lowest number of votes.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.votes IS NOT NULL RETURN m ORDER BY m.votes ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) RETURN n ORDER BY n.votes ASC LIMIT 3

question: List the first 3 languages that have been used as original languages in more than 10 movies.
gold_cypher: MATCH (l:Language)<-[:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]-(m:Movie) WITH l, count(m) AS movieCount WHERE movieCount > 10 RETURN l.name AS language ORDER BY movieCount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Language)<-[r0:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]-(m0:Movie) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the products ordered by customer 'VINET'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer {customerID: 'VINET'})-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) RETURN p.productName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Order)<-[r1:PURCHASED]-(m1:Customer {name: 'VINET'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the review texts for the businesses with the lowest star ratings?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WITH b, r ORDER BY r.stars ASC LIMIT 1 RETURN r.text AS reviewText
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Review)-[r0:REVIEWS]->(m0:Business) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.stars = (MATCH (n0:Review)-[r1:REVIEWS]->(m1:Business) RETURN min(n0.stars) AS star LIMIT 1) RETURN n.text

question: Identify the business in 'Missoula' with the highest number of 5-star reviews and list the review texts.
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business {city: 'Missoula'})<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review {stars: 5.0}) WITH b, count(r) AS reviewCount, collect(r.text) AS reviewTexts ORDER BY reviewCount DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN b.name AS businessName, reviewTexts
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)-[r1:REVIEWS]->(m1:Review {stars: 5.0}) WHERE n.city = 'Missoula' WITH n, count(DISTINCT m1) AS num RETURN n.name, m1.text ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which 3 organizations have the most articles mentioning them with a sentiment score below 0.3?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article) WHERE a.sentiment < 0.3 WITH o, count(a) AS negArticleCount ORDER BY negArticleCount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN o.name AS organization, negArticleCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article {sentiment: {sentiment}}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the top 5 products with the lowest units on order and not discontinued?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE p.unitsOnOrder IS NOT NULL AND p.discontinued = false RETURN p ORDER BY p.unitsOnOrder ASC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product) WHERE n.discontinued = false RETURN n.productName AS name ORDER BY n.unitsOnOrder ASC LIMIT 5

question: What are the top 5 most frequently spoken languages in videos?
gold_cypher: MATCH (v:Video)-[:SPOKEN_IN_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language) RETURN l.name AS language, count(*) AS frequency ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Language)<-[r0:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]-(m0:Video) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which 3 movies have the most distinct languages spoken?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:SPOKEN_IN_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language) WITH m, count(DISTINCT l) AS language_count ORDER BY language_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN m.title AS movie_title, language_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:SPoken_in_LANGUAGE]->(m0:Language) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 5 movies that have not been reviewed.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE NOT EXISTS { (m)<-[:REVIEWED]-() } RETURN m.title LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE NOT EXISTS ((n)-[r0:REVIEWED]->()) RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.title DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the characters with a 'centrality' of 0.0 who have a 'INTERACTS3' relationship.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.centrality = 0.0 AND EXISTS ((c)-[:INTERACTS3]->()) RETURN c.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:INTERACTS3]->() WHERE n.centrality = 0.0 WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which country has produced the most number of movies with an average vote greater than 8.0?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WHERE m.average_vote > 8.0 WITH c, count(m) AS movieCount ORDER BY movieCount DESC RETURN c.name AS countryName, movieCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]-(m0:Movie)-[:RATED]->(m1:Movie {average_vote: {avg_vote}}) WHERE m0.average_vote > 8.0 WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which games are played by streams that are part of teams created after 2017?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(t:Team) WHERE t.createdAt > datetime('2017-01-01') WITH s MATCH (s)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) RETURN DISTINCT g.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Game)<-[r0:PLAYS]-(m0:Stream)-[r1:HAS_TEAM]->(m1:Team) WHERE m1.createdAt >= date('2017-12-31 23:59:59') WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the top 3 applications by number of instances running on machines?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Machine)-[:RUNS]->(a:Application) WITH a, count(m) AS instances ORDER BY instances DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN a.name, instances
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Application)<-[r0:RUNS]-(m0:Machine) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the first 3 questions asked by the user with a reputation of 65?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE u.reputation = 65 RETURN q.title, q.createdAt ORDER BY q.createdAt ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:User) WHERE m0.reputation = 65 WITH n ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC RETURN DISTINCT n.text LIMIT 3

question: List the first 3 tweets from 'neo4j' that have been retweeted and mention another user.
gold_cypher: MATCH (me:Me {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet) WHERE exists{ (tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(:Tweet) }    AND exists{ (tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User) } RETURN tweet.text LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)-[r0:RETWEETS]->(m0:Tweet)<-[r1:MENTIONS]-(m1:User {name: 'neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.created_at DESC LIMIT 3

question: List all reviews written in 2017.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WHERE r.date >= date('2017-01-01') AND r.date <= date('2017-12-31') RETURN r.reviewId AS reviewId, r.text AS reviewText, r.stars AS stars, r.date AS reviewDate, u.name AS userName, b.name AS businessName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Review) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.date.year = 2017 RETURN n

question: What is the shortest path between "Addam-Marbrand" and "Cersei-Lannister" in terms of interactions?
gold_cypher: MATCH p=shortestPath((c1:Character {name: "Addam-Marbrand"})-[*]-(c2:Character {name: "Cersei-Lannister"})) RETURN p
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character {name: 'Addam-Marbrand'})-[:INTERACTS45 | INTERACTS1 | INTERACTS2 | INTERACTS3 | INTERACTS]->(*:Character {name: 'Cersei-Lannister'}) WITH n, relationships((n)-[r0:INTERACTS45 | INTERACTS1 | INTERACTS2 | INTERACTS3 | INTERACTS]->(*:Character {name: 'Cersei-Lannister'})) AS relationships RETURN length(relationships) AS shortestPath

question: Which 5 genres are most common among movies with a budget over 200 million USD?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Genre)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Movie) WHERE m0.budget > 200000000 WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the top 3 categories with the highest average unit price of products?

question: What is the average total view count of streams created in the year 2020?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE date({year: 2020}) <= s.createdAt <= date({year: 2020, month: 12, day: 31}) WITH avg(s.total_view_count) AS average_view_count RETURN average_view_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream) WHERE n.createdAt.year = 2020 RETURN avg(n.total_view_count) AS avg_total_view_count

question: What are the names of the first 3 organizations with the most competitors?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n.name ORDER BY size([x IN out('HAS_COMPETITOR') | x]) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Who are the top 3 users that 'Neo4j' retweets mentions from?

question: List characters within louvain communities 0 to 5 with a pagerank greater than 0.5.

question: List the top 5 directors with the most movies that have an imdbRating of 6 or higher.

question: List the top 5 switches by IP in zone 4.

question: What are the top 3 most popular movies according to their popularity score?

question: What are the common roles for Keanu Reeves across all his movies?
