pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Person {name: 'Keanu Reeves'})-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WITH n, m UNWIND n.roles AS role RETURN DISTINCT role }

question: List the top 5 entities that have filed the most filings where the beneficiary bank is located in the United States.
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing) WHERE f.beneficiary_bank_country = "United States" WITH e, count(f) AS filingsCount ORDER BY filingsCount DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN e.name, filingsCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:FILED]-(m0:Filing)-[r1:BENEFITS]->(m1:Entity {name: 'United States'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the first 3 movies with a revenue less than 1000 USD?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.revenue < 1000 RETURN m.title, m.revenue ORDER BY m.released LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.revenue < 1000 RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.title ASC LIMIT 3

question: List the first 5 articles mentioning organizations that have a CEO named 'Julie Spellman Sweet'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_CEO]->(:Person {name: "Julie Spellman Sweet"})<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article) RETURN a LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Article)-[r0:MENTIONS]->(m0:Organization)-[r1:HAS_CEO]->(m1:Person {name: 'Julie Spellman Sweet'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.title LIMIT 5

question: What are the creation dates of questions that have been answered and have a score greater than 10?
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.answered = true AND q.score > 10 RETURN q.createdAt
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WHERE n.answered AND n.score > 10 WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.createdAt

question: What are the names of all hashtags used in tweets from 'Neo4j'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet)-[:TAGS]->(h:Hashtag) RETURN h.name AS hashtag_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Hashtag)<-[r0:TAGS]-(m0:Tweet)-[r1:POSTS]->(m1:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the average star rating of businesses reviewed by users in each city?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WITH b.city AS city, r.stars AS stars RETURN city, avg(stars) AS averageRating
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:Review]-(m0:Review)<-[r1:WROTE]-(m1:User) WITH n, m1, AVG(r0.stars) AS avg RETURN n.city, avg

question: Which movies from France have an IMDb rating higher than 8.0?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE "France" IN m.countries AND m.imdbRating > 8.0 RETURN m.title
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WHERE n.imdbRating > 8.0 AND 'France' IN n.countries WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.title

question: What are the names of organizations that have at least one investor but no subsidiaries?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization) WHERE EXISTS { (o)<-[:HAS_INVESTOR]-() } AND NOT EXISTS { (o)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->() } RETURN o.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE size((n)-[r0:HAS_INVESTOR]->()) > 0 AND size((n)-[r1:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->()) = 0 RETURN n.name

question: What is the size of the network with IP address '10.2'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Network {ip: '10.2'}) RETURN n.size
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Network {ip: '10.2'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.size

question: Find streams that play 'Rust' and have more than 10000 followers.

question: Find the questions with an answer count greater than 3 that have no comments.

question:
"Who worked with Tim Allen in 2015?
"
gold_cypher: MATCH (timAllen:Person {name: "Tim Allen"})-[:CAST_FOR]->(m:Movie)<-[:CAST_FOR]-(coWorkers:Person) WHERE m.release_date >= date("2015-01-01") AND m.release_date <= date("2015-12-31") RETURN DISTINCT coWorkers.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)-[r0:CAST_FOR]->(m0:Movie)-[r1:CAST_FOR]->(m1:Person {name: 'Tim Allen'}) WHERE m0.release_date.year = 2015 WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the `orderID` and `shipName` of orders that were shipped on the same day.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order) WITH o.shippedDate AS shippedDate, collect(o) AS orders WHERE size(orders) > 1 UNWIND orders AS order RETURN order.orderID, order.shipName

question: Find the movies that have been released in the same year as the movie with the lowest IMDb rating.

question: Which users have 'Neo4j' mentioned the most in tweets? List the top 3.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)<-[:MENTIONS]-(t:Tweet)<-[:POSTS]-(:Me {name: 'Neo4j'}) RETURN u.name AS user, count(t) AS mentions ORDER BY mentions DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Tweet)-[r1:TAGS]->(m1:Hashtag {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.screen_name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 5 filings with the shortest duration between begin and end in 2005.
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.begin >= datetime('2005-01-01T00:00:00Z') AND f.end <= datetime('2005-12-31T23:59:59Z') WITH f, duration.between(f.begin, f.end) AS duration ORDER BY duration ASC LIMIT 5 RETURN f.sar_id AS SAR_ID, f.begin AS Begin_Date, f.end AS End_Date, duration AS Duration
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n ORDER BY (n.end - n.begin) ASC LIMIT 5

question: What is the average budget of movies released before 2000?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.year < 2000 WITH avg(m.budget) AS averageBudget RETURN averageBudget
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.year < 2000 RETURN avg(n.budget)

question: Which users are followed by 'neo4j' and have more than 10000 followers?
gold_cypher: MATCH (me:Me {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:FOLLOWS]->(user:User) WHERE user.followers > 10000 RETURN user.screen_name, user.followers
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:FOLLOWS]-(m0:User {name: 'neo4j'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num WHERE num > 10000

question: List the entities associated with the 'Bahamas Leaks'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.sourceID = 'Bahamas Leaks' RETURN e
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:connected_to]-(m0:Entity {name: 'Bahamas Leaks'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which 5 products have been reordered the most times?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product)-[:ORDERS]->(o:Order) RETURN p.productName, count(o) AS reorderCount ORDER BY reorderCount DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Product) WITH n, count(DISTINCT r0) AS num RETURN n.productName, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which city has the most businesses with an average review rating above 4.5?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WITH b, avg(r.stars) AS averageRating WHERE averageRating > 4.5 WITH b.city AS city, count(b) AS businessCount RETURN city, businessCount ORDER BY businessCount DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:REVIEWS]-(m0:Review) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.city ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which organizations have been mentioned in articles about corporate social responsibility?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:HAS_CHUNK]->(c:Chunk) WHERE c.text CONTAINS "corporate social responsibility" MATCH (a)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) RETURN DISTINCT o.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article)-[r1:MENTIONS]->(m1:Organization {name: 'corporate social responsibility'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which directors have directed both a comedy and a drama movie?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WHERE g.name = 'Comedy' WITH d, collect(m) AS comedyMovies WHERE exists {     MATCH (d)-[:DIRECTED]->(m2:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g2:Genre)     WHERE g2.name = 'Drama' } RETURN d, comedyMovies
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Director)<-[r0:DIRECTED]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:IN_GENRE]->(m1:Genre {name: 'Comedy'}),(n:Director)<-[r2:DIRECTED]-(m2:Movie)-[r3:IN_GENRE]->(m3:Genre {name: 'Drama'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the top 3 organizations with the highest revenue that are headquartered in the United States of America.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Country {name: "United States of America"}) MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(city:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(c) WITH o ORDER BY o.revenue DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN o.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:IN_CITY]->(m0:City)-[r1:IN_COUNTRY]->(m1:Country {name: 'United States of America'}) WITH n ORDER BY n.revenue DESC RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: Which movies have been produced in more than one country?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WITH m, count(c) AS num_countries WHERE num_countries > 1 RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, num_countries
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]-(m0:Country) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.title WHERE num > 1

question: Which questions have been asked by users with more than 2000 reputation and have scores less than 0?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE u.reputation > 2000 AND q.score < 0 RETURN q.title AS question_title, q.link AS question_link, q.score AS question_score, u.display_name AS user_name, u.reputation AS user_reputation
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:User) WHERE m0.reputation > 2000 AND n.score < 0 WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.text

question: Who has the highest average review rating?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) WITH p, avg(r.rating) AS avg_rating RETURN p.name, avg_rating ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:REVIEWED]-(m0:Movie) WITH n, avg(r0.rating) AS rating RETURN n.name WITH n, rating ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which 3 entities have the most filings as originators and are located in 'China'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(f:Filing) WHERE e.country = 'CHN' RETURN e, count(f) AS filings_count ORDER BY filings_count DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:ORIGINATOR]-(m0:Filing)-[r1:FILED]->(m1:Entity) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num WHERE n.country = 'China' RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the name of the movie with the highest IMDb rating that is a documentary?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre {name: 'Documentary'}) WITH max(m.imdbRating) AS maxRating MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(:Genre {name: 'Documentary'}) WHERE m.imdbRating = maxRating RETURN m.title
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:IN_GENRE]->(m0:Genre {name: 'documentary'}) WITH n ORDER BY n.imdbRating DESC RETURN n.title LIMIT 1

question: How many racks contain switches in zone 4 of DataCenter 'DC1'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (dc:DataCenter {name: 'DC1'})-[:CONTAINS]->(r:Rack {zone: 4})-[:HOLDS]->(s:Switch) RETURN count(DISTINCT r) AS numberOfRacksWithSwitches
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Rack)<-[r0:CONTAINS]-(m0:DataCenter {name: 'DC1'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT n) AS num RETURN num WHERE n.zone = 4 AND n:Rack

question: Which movies have a homepage URL specified?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.homepage IS NOT NULL RETURN m.title, m.homepage
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.homepage IS NOT NULL RETURN n.name

question: Which organizations have subsidiaries in more than three different countries?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(sub:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(country:Country) WITH o, count(DISTINCT country) AS countriesCount WHERE countriesCount > 3 RETURN o.name AS Organization, countriesCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]-(m0:Organization)-[r1:IN_CITY]->(m1:City)-[r2:IN_COUNTRY]->(m2:Country) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m2) AS num RETURN n.name, num WHERE num > 3

question: What are the first 3 movies that have a revenue to budget ratio greater than 3?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.revenue / m.budget > 3 RETURN m.title, m.revenue, m.budget ORDER BY m.revenue / m.budget DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.revenue / n.budget DESC LIMIT 3

question: List entities that were incorporated on '23-MAR-2006'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.incorporation_date = '23-MAR-2006' RETURN e.name AS entity_name, e.incorporation_date AS incorporation_date
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.incorporation_date = '23-MAR-2006' RETURN n.name

question: List three movies reviewed with a rating above 90.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[r:REVIEWED]-(p:Person) WHERE r.rating > 90 RETURN m.title LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:REVIEWED]-(m0:Person) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.rating > 90 RETURN n.title LIMIT 3

question: List the top 5 shortest movies with an imdbRating above 6.0.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.imdbRating > 6.0 RETURN m.title, m.runtime, m.imdbRating ORDER BY m.runtime ASC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.imdbRating > 6.0 RETURN n ORDER BY n.runtime ASC LIMIT 5

question: List all businesses and their corresponding reviews from 'Burlingame'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(:Category), (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b) WHERE b.city = 'Burlingame' RETURN b.name AS businessName, r.text AS reviewText, r.stars AS reviewStars, r.date AS reviewDate
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:REVIEWS]-(m0:Review) WHERE n.city = 'Burlingame' WITH n, collect(DISTINCT m0) AS reviews RETURN n, reviews

question: What is the total number of filings originating from countries with `tld` "US"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Country {tld: 'US'}) MATCH (e:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c) MATCH (e)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing) RETURN count(DISTINCT f) AS totalFilings
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Country {tld: 'US'})<-[:COUNTRY]-(m:Filing) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m) AS num RETURN n, num } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN sum(num)

question: List the roles played by actors in the first 3 movies directed by Nancy Meyers.
gold_cypher: MATCH (director:Person {name: "Nancy Meyers"})-[:DIRECTED]->(movie:Movie) WITH movie ORDER BY movie.released LIMIT 3 MATCH (actor:Person)-[actedIn:ACTED_IN]->(movie) RETURN movie.title AS MovieTitle, actor.name AS ActorName, actedIn.roles AS Roles
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)-[r0:ACTED_IN]->(m0:Movie)<-[r1:DIRECTED]-(m1:Person {name: 'Nancy Meyers'}) WITH DISTINCT n, m0 RETURN DISTINCT n.name, m0.title ORDER BY m0.title ASC LIMIT 3

question: Which users have reviewed more than one business?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WITH u, COUNT(DISTINCT b) AS businessCount WHERE businessCount > 1 RETURN u.name AS userName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:WROTE]-(m0:Review)-[r1:REVIEWS]->(m1:Business) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m1) AS num RETURN n.name WHERE num > 1

question: Which 5 users have interacted with the most users with a size over 2?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[r:INTERACTED]->(v:User) WHERE v.size > 2 WITH u, COUNT(DISTINCT v) AS interactionCount RETURN u.label AS user, interactionCount ORDER BY interactionCount DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:INTERACTED]-(m0:User)-[r1:INTERACTED]->(m1:User {size: {size}}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.label, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: Who are the top 3 producers of movies with a tagline including 'Speed'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:PRODUCED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline CONTAINS 'Speed' RETURN p.name AS producer, COUNT(m) AS movie_count ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:PRODUCED]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(m1:Movie {tagline: 'Speed'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the officers who are 'officer_of' entities that have a 'same_as' relationship with entities that have a 'registered_address' in 'Hong Kong'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Officer)-[:officer_of]->(e1:Entity)-[:same_as]->(e2:Entity)-[:registered_address]->(a:Address) WHERE a.countries = 'Hong Kong' RETURN DISTINCT o.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Officer)-[r0:officer_of]->(m0:Entity)-[r1:registered_address]->(m1:Address {name: 'Hong Kong'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: "톰크루즈 주연의 war 영화는 무엇이 있는가?"
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor {name: "Tom Cruise"})-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre {name: "War"}) RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, m.year AS ReleaseYear, m.imdbRating AS IMDbRating
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Actor {name: '톰크루즈'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE 'war' IN [x IN n.genres OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Movie)-[r1:IN_GENRE]->(m1:Genre) WHERE m1.name = x RETURN n.title

question: Find characters that have 'INTERACTS1' relationship with a weight above 200.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c1:Character)-[r:INTERACTS1]->(c2:Character) WHERE r.weight > 200 RETURN c1.name AS Character1, c2.name AS Character2, r.weight AS Weight
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r:INTERACTS1]->(m:Character) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE r.weight > 200 RETURN n.name

question: What are the names of 3 industry categories that the most organizations belong to?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(ic:IndustryCategory) WITH ic, count(o) as orgCount ORDER BY orgCount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN ic.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:IndustryCategory)<-[r0:HAS_CATEGORY]-(m0:Organization) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: "get a list of all unique tags"
gold_cypher: MATCH (:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(tag:Tag) RETURN DISTINCT tag.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tag) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Show the top 3 streams with the most moderators.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream) WITH s, size([(s)<-[:MODERATOR]-(m) | m]) AS num_moderators ORDER BY num_moderators DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN s.name AS stream_name, num_moderators
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)<-[r0:MODERATOR]-(m0:Stream) WITH n, count(DISTINCT r0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the average budget of science fiction movies?
gold_cypher: MATCH (g:Genre {name: 'Science Fiction'})<-[:IN_GENRE]-(m:Movie) WITH avg(m.budget) AS averageBudget RETURN averageBudget
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Genre {name: 'science fiction'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.budget)

question: What is the average rating difference between movies directed by the same person?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m1:Movie) MATCH (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m2:Movie) WHERE id(m1) < id(m2) WITH m1, m2, abs(avg(m1.rating) - avg(m2.rating)) AS rating_diff RETURN avg(rating_diff) AS average_rating_difference
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:DIRECTED]-(m0:Person)<-[r1:DIRECTED]-(m1:Movie)-[r2:REVIEWED]->(m2:Movie) WITH n, m0, m1 WHERE n.title <> m1.title RETURN avg(r2.rating - n.rating) AS avg_rating

question: What are the first 3 movies released after 2010?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.year > 2010 RETURN m.title, m.released ORDER BY m.released LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.year > 2010 RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.year ASC LIMIT 3

question: Find the top 5 filings with the largest amounts that concern entities in 'China'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Country {name: 'China'})<-[:COUNTRY]-(e:Entity)<-[:CONCERNS]-(f:Filing) RETURN f ORDER BY f.amount DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:CONCERNS]->(m0:Entity)-[r1:COUNTRY]->(m1:Country {name: 'China'}) WITH n RETURN n ORDER BY n.amount DESC LIMIT 5

question: Identify all users who have reviewed businesses on 'E Front St' and the names of those businesses.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WHERE b.address CONTAINS 'E Front St' RETURN u.name AS userName, b.name AS businessName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:WROTE]->(m0:Review)-[r1:REVIEWS]->(m1:Business {name: 'E Front St'}) WITH DISTINCT n, m1 RETURN n.name, m1.name

question: Which 3 users have reviewed businesses on 'E Front St'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WHERE b.address CONTAINS 'E Front St' RETURN u.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:WROTE]-(m0:Review)-[r1:REVIEWS]->(m1:Business {name: 'E Front St'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: Who are the top 3 actors in terms of movies acted in from 1990 to 2000?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.released >= 1990 AND m.released <= 2000 WITH p, count(m) AS movieCount ORDER BY movieCount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN p.name AS actor, movieCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie) WHERE m0.released >= 1990 AND m0.released <= 2000 WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the average reorderLevel for products that have been ordered in quantities greater than 100?
gold_cypher: MATCH ()-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE p.unitsOnOrder > 100 RETURN avg(p.reorderLevel)
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Product) WHERE n.quantity > 100 WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.reorderLevel)

question: List all people who are board members of organizations in Houston.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]-(o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(:City {name: 'Houston'}) RETURN p.name AS person, o.name AS organization
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]-(m0:Organization)-[r1:IN_CITY]->(m1:City {name: 'Houston'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the distinct 'beneficiary_iso' values for filings where the originator bank is 'CIMB Bank Berhad' and the amount is greater than 500,000.
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.originator_bank = "CIMB Bank Berhad" AND f.amount > 500000 RETURN DISTINCT f.beneficiary_iso
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing) WHERE n.originator_bank = 'CIMB Bank Berhad' AND n.amount > 500000 WITH DISTINCT n RETURN DISTINCT n.beneficiary_iso

question: What is the name of the organization with the highest number of employees that is headquartered in a city with a population of less than 500,000?
gold_cypher: MATCH (org:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(city:City) WITH org, city, org.nbrEmployees AS numEmployees ORDER BY numEmployees DESC RETURN org.name AS organizationName, numEmployees LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:IN_CITY]->(m0:City)-[r1:IN_COUNTRY]->(m1:Country {name: 'United States of America'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT n) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who reviewed the most movies?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) RETURN p.name, count(m) AS movies_reviewed ORDER BY movies_reviewed DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:REVIEWED]-(m0:Movie) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name WITH n, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which organizations are mentioned in articles with a sentiment score greater than 0.8?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE a.sentiment > 0.8 RETURN DISTINCT o
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article {sentiment: {sentiment}}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the most common language among movies with a budget lower than 10 million dollars?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.budget < 10000000 UNWIND m.languages AS language WITH language, count(*) AS count ORDER BY count DESC RETURN language LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:IN_GENRE]->(m0:Genre)<-[r1:IN_GENRE]-(m1:Movie) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num WHERE n.budget < 10000000 RETURN n.languages[0] ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the top 5 movies with the most spoken languages and released after 2015?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:SPOKEN_IN_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language) WHERE m.release_date > date('2015-01-01') WITH m, count(l) AS languages_spoken ORDER BY languages_spoken DESC RETURN m.title, languages_spoken LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n ORDER BY size((n)-[r0:SPoken_in_LANGUAGE]->()) DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the top 5 movies with the least votes and their release years?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.votes IS NOT NULL RETURN m.title, m.released, m.votes ORDER BY m.votes LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) RETURN n.title, n.released ORDER BY n.votes ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which 3 businesses have reviews mentioning 'sandwich' at 'Farmer's Market'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WHERE r.text CONTAINS 'sandwich' AND r.text CONTAINS "Farmer's Market" RETURN b.name, b.address, b.city, b.state, b.businessId LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:Review]-(m0:Review)-[r1:REVIEWS]->(m1:Business {name: 'Farmer''s Market'}) WHERE 'sandwich' IN split(m0.text, ' ') WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: List the top 5 videos by the number of countries they were produced in.
gold_cypher: MATCH (v:Video)-[:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WITH v, count(c) AS countriesProducedIn ORDER BY countriesProducedIn DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN v.title, countriesProducedIn
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Video) OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[r0:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(m0:Country) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.title, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many Officers are registered with the sourceID "Panama Papers"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Officer {sourceID: "Panama Papers"}) RETURN count(o) AS officerCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Officer) WHERE n.sourceID = 'Panama Papers' WITH n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: What are the first 3 businesses reviewed in 2018?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WHERE r.date >= date('2018-01-01') AND r.date < date('2019-01-01') RETURN b.name, r.date ORDER BY r.date ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:REVIEWS]-(m0:Review) WHERE toLocalDate(r0.date) >= date('2018-01-01') AND toLocalDate(r0.date) <= date('2018-12-31') WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 3

question: What is the total revenue generated by orders that include products with a discount?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[rel:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE rel.discount > 0 WITH o, sum(toFloat(rel.unitPrice) * rel.quantity * (1 - toFloat(rel.discount))) AS orderRevenue RETURN sum(orderRevenue) AS totalRevenue
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Order)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Product) WHERE n.discount IS NOT NULL RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Order)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Product) WHERE n.discount IS NOT NULL RETURN n, m0 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN sum(n.freight) AS total

question: Which movies have actors who have also directed a movie?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE exists {     MATCH (a)-[:DIRECTED]->(:Movie) } RETURN DISTINCT m
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Actor)-[r1:DIRECTED]->(m1:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.title

question: Which organizations are public and have more than 300 employees?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization) WHERE o.isPublic = true AND o.nbrEmployees > 300 RETURN o.name, o.nbrEmployees
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WHERE n.isPublic AND n.nbrEmployees > 300 RETURN n.name

question: "Which is the best movie?"
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) RETURN m.title AS Movie, m.votes AS Votes ORDER BY m.votes DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:REVIEWED]-(m0:Person) WITH n, max(r0.rating) AS max RETURN n.title

question: Who are the first 3 children of people who are CEOs of public organizations?
gold_cypher: MATCH (ceo:Person)<-[:HAS_CEO]-(org:Organization {isPublic: true})-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY*0..3]->(:Organization),       (ceo)-[:HAS_CHILD]->(child:Person) RETURN child.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:HAS_CHILD]-(m0:Person)-[r1:HAS_CATEGORY]->(m1:Organization {name: 'public organization'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE m0:Person AND m0.name STARTS WITH 'CEO' RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: Which 3 movies have been produced by 'Pixar Animation Studios' and have a runtime under 100 minutes?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:PRODUCED_BY]->(c:ProductionCompany {name: 'Pixar Animation Studios'}) WHERE m.runtime < 100 RETURN m.title LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:PRODUCED_BY]->(m0:ProductionCompany {name: 'Pixar Animation Studios'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.runtime < 100 RETURN n.title LIMIT 3

question: Identify the top 3 tweets with the highest number of favorites.
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tweet) RETURN t.text, t.favorites ORDER BY t.favorites DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet) RETURN n ORDER BY n.favorites DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 3 most recent reviews.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) RETURN r.date AS reviewDate, r.text AS reviewText, r.stars AS reviewStars, u.name AS userName, b.name AS businessName ORDER BY r.date DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Review) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 3

question: List all movies that have been released on Christmas Day.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.released ENDS WITH "-12-25" RETURN m
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WHERE n.released STARTS WITH '1900-12-25' RETURN n.title

question: Show businesses that have been reviewed with exactly 5 stars.
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WHERE r.stars = 5.0 RETURN b
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:REVIEWS]-(m0:Review {stars: 5.0}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n

question: What are the top 5 most recent movies in the database and their genres?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN m.title AS movieTitle, m.released AS releaseDate, collect(g.name) AS genres ORDER BY m.released DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Genre) WITH n, m0 RETURN n.title, m0.name ORDER BY n.released DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which three tweets have the most mentions of other users?
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(u:User) WITH t, COUNT(u) AS mention_count ORDER BY mention_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN t.id_str AS tweet_id, t.text AS tweet_text, mention_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)-[r0:MENTIONS]->(m0:User) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the first 3 entities that have been beneficiaries in filings with an amount over 50 million USD.
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity) WHERE f.amount > 50000000 RETURN e.name AS beneficiary_entity LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:BELONGS_TO]-(m0:Filing)-[r1:BELONGS_TO]->(m1:Entity) WHERE m0.amount > 50000000 WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name LIMIT 3

question: Identify the first 3 genres most frequently linked to movies directed by 'Steven Spielberg'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Director {name: 'Steven Spielberg'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN g.name AS Genre, count(m) AS MoviesCount ORDER BY MoviesCount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Genre)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Movie)<-[r1:DIRECTED]-(m1:Director {name: 'Steven Spielberg'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 3 movies that were produced by 'Pixar Animation Studios' and have a runtime longer than 90 minutes.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:PRODUCED_BY]->(c:ProductionCompany {name: 'Pixar Animation Studios'}) WHERE m.runtime > 90 RETURN m.title, m.runtime ORDER BY m.popularity DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:PRODUCED_BY]->(m0:ProductionCompany {name: 'Pixar Animation Studios'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.runtime > 90 RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.title DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the names of the first 5 people who are board members of more than one organization?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]->(o:Organization) WITH p, count(o) AS orgCount WHERE orgCount > 1 RETURN p.name LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]-(m0:Organization),(n:Person)<-[r1:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]-(m1:Organization) WHERE m0.name <> m1.name WITH n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name LIMIT 5

question: Provide the names of all products that have a quantity per unit description containing 'bottles'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE p.quantityPerUnit CONTAINS 'bottles' RETURN p.productName AS productName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product) WHERE 'bottles' IN nodes(n).quantityPerUnit RETURN n.name

question: Who are the customers in the 'NULL' region?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.region = 'NULL' RETURN c.contactName AS customerName, c.companyName AS companyName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Customer) WHERE n.region = 'NULL' WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n

question: What is the average length of the reviews written by each user?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review) WITH u, avg(size(r.text)) AS avgReviewLength RETURN u.name AS userName, avgReviewLength
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Review)<-[r0:WROTE]-(m0:User) WITH n, AVG(toString(length(n.text))) AS avg RETURN avg

question: List all businesses that have been reviewed by 'Jenny'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {name: 'Jenny'})-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) RETURN b.name AS businessName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:REVIEWS]-(m0:Review)<-[r1:WROTE]-(m1:User {name: 'Jenny'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Find the businesses with addresses starting with '301' and list their categories.
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:Category) WHERE b.address STARTS WITH '301' RETURN b.name AS businessName, c.name AS categoryName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)-[r0:IN_CATEGORY]->(m0:Category) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE startsWith(n.address, '301') RETURN n.name, m0.name

question: Which city has the most organizations with public status?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization {isPublic: true})-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City) RETURN c.name AS City, count(o) AS NumberOfPublicOrganizations ORDER BY NumberOfPublicOrganizations DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:City)<-[r0:IN_CITY]-(m0:Organization {name: 'public'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the first 3 routers located in zone 1 in the data center?
gold_cypher: MATCH (dc:DataCenter {name: 'DC1'})-[:CONTAINS]->(r:Router {zone: 1}) RETURN r.name ORDER BY r.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Router)-[r0:CONTAINS]->(m0:DataCenter {name: 'DC1'}) WHERE n.zone = 1 WITH DISTINCT n ORDER BY n.name LIMIT 3 RETURN n.name

question: Identify the first 5 actors who have acted in movies with a budget less than 50 million dollars.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.budget < 50000000 RETURN a LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie) WHERE m0.budget < 50000000 WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which 3 countries have produced the most movies with a runtime longer than 120 minutes?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WHERE m.runtime > 120 RETURN c.name AS country, COUNT(m) AS movie_count ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:IN_GENRE]->(m1:Genre {name: 'Movie'}) WHERE m0.runtime > 120 RETURN n.name WITH DISTINCT n.name ORDER BY count(n) DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many users have written reviews for 'Missoula Public Library'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business {name: 'Missoula Public Library'})<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review)<-[:WROTE]-(u:User) RETURN count(DISTINCT u) AS NumberOfUsers
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:WROTE]->(m0:Review)-[r1:REVIEWS]->(m1:Business {name: 'Missoula Public Library'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: Show the first 3 questions asked by 'Christopher'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {display_name: 'Christopher'})-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) RETURN q ORDER BY q.createdAt LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:User {name: 'Christopher'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.text ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which entities benefited from filings where the beneficiary bank is located in the United Kingdom?
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity) WHERE f.beneficiary_bank_country = "United Kingdom" RETURN DISTINCT e.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:CONCERNS]-(m0:Filing)-[r1:BENEFITS]->(m1:Entity {name: 'United Kingdom'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the top 5 most popular movies released before 2000?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.release_date < date('2000-01-01') AND m.popularity IS NOT NULL RETURN m ORDER BY m.popularity DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.release_date < date('2000-01-01') RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.popularity DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which entities have benefited from filings where the originator bank is "CIMB Bank Berhad"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity) WHERE f.originator_bank = "CIMB Bank Berhad" RETURN DISTINCT e
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:BELONGS_TO]-(m0:Filing)-[r1:ORIGINATOR]->(m1:Entity {name: 'CIMB Bank Berhad'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the orders placed by customers in 'Berlin' that have a shipped date in 1997.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE c.city = 'Berlin' AND o.shippedDate STARTS WITH '1997' RETURN o.orderID AS orderID, o.shippedDate AS shippedDate, c.companyName AS customerName, p.productName AS productName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order)<-[r0:PURCHASED]-(m0:Customer) WHERE n.shippedDate =~ '^1997' AND m0.city = 'Berlin' WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n

question: List all users retweeted by 'Me'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (me:Me)-[:POSTS]->(retweet:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(original:Tweet)<-[:POSTS]-(user:User) RETURN user.screen_name AS retweeted_user
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:RT_MENTIONS]-(m0:Me) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n

question: List the top 5 comments with a link containing 'neomodel'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Comment) WHERE c.link CONTAINS 'neomodel' RETURN c ORDER BY c.score DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Comment) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n ORDER BY n.score DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the first 5 orders that included products from at least three different categories.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH o, COUNT(DISTINCT c.categoryID) AS categoryCount WHERE categoryCount >= 3 RETURN o.orderID, o.orderDate, o.shipName, o.shipCity, o.shipCountry ORDER BY o.orderDate LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(m1:Category),(n:Order)<-[r1:ORDERS]-(m2:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(m3:Category),(n:Order)<-[r2:ORDERS]-(m4:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(m5:Category) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE size(DISTINCT m1.categoryID) >= 3 RETURN n.orderID ORDER BY n.orderID ASC LIMIT 5

question: What is the total revenue generated by orders shipped in the year 1996?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[orders:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE o.shippedDate STARTS WITH '1996' WITH o, toFloat(orders.unitPrice) * orders.quantity AS revenue RETURN sum(revenue) AS totalRevenue
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Order)-[r0:ORDERS]->(m0:Product) WHERE n.shippedDate STARTS WITH '1996' RETURN n, m0 UNION ALL MATCH (n:Order)-[r1:ORDERS]->(m1:Product) WHERE n.shippedDate STARTS WITH '1996' RETURN n, m1 } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN sum(n.freight) AS revenue

question: List the top 3 videos that have been produced by 'Pixar Animation Studios' and have a runtime shorter than 50 minutes.
gold_cypher: MATCH (v:Video)-[:PRODUCED_BY]->(pc:ProductionCompany {name: 'Pixar Animation Studios'}) WHERE v.runtime < 50 RETURN v.title, v.runtime ORDER BY v.runtime ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Video)-[r0:PRODUCED_BY]->(m0:ProductionCompany {name: 'Pixar Animation Studios'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.runtime < 50 RETURN n.title ORDER BY n.runtime ASC LIMIT 3

question: What are the most common tags for questions that have been asked by users with a display name containing 'Le'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE u.display_name CONTAINS 'Le' RETURN t.name AS tag, COUNT(*) AS tag_count ORDER BY tag_count DESC LIMIT 10
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tag)<-[r0:TAGGED]-(m0:Question)<-[r1:ASKED]-(m1:User) WHERE toUpper(m1.display_name) CONTAINS 'LE' WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC

question: What are the names of cities that host organizations with a public status?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City) WHERE o.isPublic = true RETURN DISTINCT c.name
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:City)<-[r0:IN_CITY]-(m0:Organization) WHERE m0.isPublic = true WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name as name }

question: Which 3 directors have directed the most movies released after 2005?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.released > 2005 WITH d, count(m) AS num_movies ORDER BY num_movies DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN d.name AS director, num_movies
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)-[r0:DIRECTED]->(m0:Movie {released: {param0}}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name WITH DISTINCT n ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many businesses are reviewed by users named 'Bob'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {name: 'Bob'})-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT b) AS numberOfBusinessesReviewed
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:Review]-(m0:User {name: 'Bob'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: What are the top 5 oldest streams based on the 'createdAt' property?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream) RETURN s ORDER BY s.createdAt ASC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream) WITH DISTINCT n ORDER BY n.createdAt ASC RETURN n LIMIT 5

question: Display the top 5 streams that play the game 'Rust'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(:Game {name: 'Rust'}) RETURN s.name AS stream, s.followers AS followers ORDER BY followers DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:PLAYS]->(m0:Game {name: 'Rust'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.total_view_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the top 5 oldest actors in the database.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor) WHERE a.born IS NOT NULL RETURN a.name, a.born ORDER BY a.born ASC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.born ASC LIMIT 5

question: How many unique games are played by streams with more than 500000 followers?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) WHERE s.followers > 500000 RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT g.name) AS unique_games
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Game)<-[r0:PLAYS]-(m0:Stream) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE size((n:Game)<-[r1:PLAYS]-(m1:Stream {followers: {followers}})) > 500000 RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: Which organizations are mentioned in articles with a sentiment score greater than 0.8?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE a.sentiment > 0.8 RETURN DISTINCT o.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article {name: 'sentiment score > 0.8'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Find the top 5 customers who have ordered the product 'Chai'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product {productName: 'Chai'})<-[:ORDERS]-(o:Order)<-[:PURCHASED]-(c:Customer) RETURN c.companyName, COUNT(o) AS orderCount ORDER BY orderCount DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Customer)<-[r0:PURCHASED]-(m0:Order)-[r1:ORDERS]->(m1:Product {name: 'Chai'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which addresses are linked to more than one entity as their registered address?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Address)<-[:registered_address]-(e:Entity) WITH a, COUNT(e) AS entityCount WHERE entityCount > 1 RETURN a.address AS Address, entityCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Address)<-[r0:registered_address]-(m0:Entity) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.address WHERE num > 1

question: "what is the highest revenue generating business in the United States of America?"
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(country:Country {name: "United States of America"}) RETURN o.name AS BusinessName, o.revenue AS Revenue ORDER BY o.revenue DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:IN_COUNTRY]->(m0:Country {name: 'United States of America'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.revenue DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total number of businesses in the database?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business) RETURN count(b)
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: What are the names of the entities that filed filings where the amount is greater than 1000000 and the originator bank is "CIMB Bank Berhad"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.amount > 1000000 AND f.originator_bank = "CIMB Bank Berhad" MATCH (e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f) RETURN e.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:FILED]-(m0:Filing {amount: {amount}, originator_bank: {originator_bank}}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which characters have a centrality less than 0.1?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.centrality < 0.1 RETURN c.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.centrality < 0.1 RETURN n.name

question: List the top 5 suppliers based on the number of cities they supply to.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product)<-[:ORDERS]-(o:Order) WITH s, COLLECT(DISTINCT o.shipCity) AS cities RETURN s.companyName AS supplier, SIZE(cities) AS cityCount ORDER BY cityCount DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:SUPPLIES]-(m0:Product)<-[r1:PART_OF]-(m1:Category) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r2:SUPPLIES]-(m2:Product)<-[r3:ORDERS]-(m3:Order) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which characters have a louvain value exactly 5 and a pagerank less than 2?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.louvain = 5 AND c.pagerank < 2 RETURN c
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.louvain = 5 AND n.pagerank < 2 RETURN n.name

question: Find all questions asked before June 2020.
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.createdAt < datetime("2020-06-01T00:00:00Z") RETURN q.title, q.link, q.createdAt
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.createdAt < datetime('2020-06-01 00:00:00') RETURN n

question: List the first 3 valid_until dates for relationships connected to Addresses.
gold_cypher: MATCH ()-[r]->(a:Address) WITH collect(DISTINCT r.valid_until) AS valid_untils RETURN valid_untils[..3] AS first_3_valid_untils
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Address)<-[r0:connected_to]-(m0:Node) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.valid_until ORDER BY n.valid_until ASC LIMIT 3

question: Which products have been ordered on dates later than '1997-01-01'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE o.orderDate > '1997-01-01' RETURN p.productName AS productName, o.orderDate AS orderDate
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)<-[r0:ORDERS]-[r1:ORDERS]->(m0:Order) WHERE toDate(r1.orderID) > date('1997-01-01') WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.productName

question: Which actors have starred in both a 'Comedy' and a 'Drama' movie?
gold_cypher: MATCH (actor:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WHERE g.name = 'Comedy' WITH DISTINCT actor MATCH (actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WHERE g.name = 'Drama' WITH DISTINCT actor.name AS actorName RETURN actorName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:IN_GENRE]->(mo0:Genre {name: 'Comedy'}),(n:Actor)<-[r2:ACTED_IN]-(m1:Movie)-[r3:IN_GENRE]->(mo1:Genre {name: 'Drama'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the total number of filings where the 'originator_lng' and 'beneficiary_lng' values are within 10 degrees of each other?
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE abs(toFloat(f.originator_lng) - toFloat(f.beneficiary_lng)) <= 10 WITH DISTINCT f RETURN count(f) AS totalFilings
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Filing) WHERE abs(n.origin_lng.toInteger() - n.beneficiary_lng.toInteger()) <= 10 RETURN n } WITH nodes(n) RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: Which 3 production companies have produced the most movies in the genre 'Drama'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:ProductionCompany)-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre {name: 'Drama'}) RETURN c.name AS company, count(m) AS movie_count ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:ProductionCompany)<-[r0:PRODUCED_BY]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:IN_GENRE]->(m1:Genre {name: 'Drama'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the answers with a score equal to 1 and are marked as accepted.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Answer) WHERE a.score = 1 AND a.is_accepted = true RETURN a
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Answer) WHERE n.score = 1 AND n.is_accepted = true WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n

question: Who are the top 3 actors by number of followers?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:FOLLOWS]->(actor:Person) WITH actor, count(p) AS followers ORDER BY followers DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN actor.name, followers
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n.name ORDER BY size([x IN out[:FOLLOWS] RETURN x]) DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 5 questions by users who have a link ending in 'alexandre'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE u.link ENDS WITH 'alexandre' RETURN q ORDER BY q.score DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)<-[r0:ASKED]-(m0:User) WHERE r0.direction = 'in' AND m0.link ENDS WITH 'alexandre' WITH n ORDER BY n.upVotes DESC RETURN n.text LIMIT 5

question: Can you list the top 5 movies that are part of more than one collection?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_COLLECTION]->(c:Collection) WITH m, count(c) AS num_collections WHERE num_collections > 1 RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, num_collections ORDER BY num_collections DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:IN_COLLECTION]-(m0:Collection) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.title, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the body_markdown of the comments associated with the question with the highest view count.
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WITH max(q.view_count) AS max_views MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.view_count = max_views MATCH (q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(c:Comment) RETURN c.body_markdown
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Comment)-[r0:COMMENTED_ON]->(m0:Question) WITH n, m0 ORDER BY m0.view_count DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN n.body_markdown

question: Which 3 directors have the highest average vote for their movies?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:CREW_FOR {job: 'Director'}]->(m:Movie) WITH p, avg(m.average_vote) AS avg_vote RETURN p.name AS director, avg_vote ORDER BY avg_vote DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)-[r0:CREW_FOR]->(m0:Movie)<-[r1:CREW_FOR]-(m1:Movie)-[r2:RATED]->(m2:Movie) WITH n, avg(m2.average_vote) AS avg RETURN DISTINCT n.name ORDER BY avg DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find all entities with a struck_off_date in February 2013 and a service provider of 'Mossack Fonseca'.

question: What is the average number of followers for streams that have the language "en" and have at least one moderator who also moderates a stream with the language "ru" and have at least one VIP?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:RATED]-(m0:User) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.title ORDER BY min(r0.rating) ASC LIMIT 5

question: How many users have asked questions with a score greater than 5?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE q.score > 5 WITH DISTINCT u RETURN count(u)
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:ASKED]->(m0:Question {score: {param}}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: How many characters have a `degree` greater than 100?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.degree > 100 RETURN count(c)
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Character) WHERE n.degree > 100 RETURN n as n } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)

question: What is the average 'centrality' of characters in the graph?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) RETURN avg(c.centrality)
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.centrality)

question: What are the names of organizations that have at least three categories associated with them?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(c:IndustryCategory) WITH o, COUNT(c) AS categoryCount WHERE categoryCount >= 3 RETURN o.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:HAS_CATEGORY]->(m0:IndustryCategory) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name WHERE num >= 3

question: Which users with a reputation over 100000 have asked questions that have been downvoted?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE u.reputation > 100000 AND q.downVotes > 0 RETURN u
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:ASKED]->(m0:Question)<-[r1:DOWNVOTED]-(m1:Question) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.reputation > 100000 RETURN n.display_name

question: List the top 3 movies that have been directed by actors.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, m.released AS ReleaseDate ORDER BY m.imdbRating DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:DIRECTED]-(m0:Actor) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n.title ORDER BY n.title DESC LIMIT 3

question: Identify the organizations that have a CEO with a summary including 'executive' and are located in a country named 'United States of America'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (org:Organization)-[:HAS_CEO]->(ceo:Person),        (org)-[:IN_CITY]->(city:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(country:Country) WHERE ceo.summary CONTAINS 'executive'    AND country.name = 'United States of America' RETURN org.name AS OrganizationName, ceo.name AS CEOName, ceo.summary AS CEOSummary, country.name AS CountryName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:HAS_CEO]->(m0:Person)-[r1:HAS_PARENT]->(m1:Person {name: 'executive'}) RETURN DISTINCT n.name

question: What is the total revenue of all organizations headquartered in the United States?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Country {name: "United States of America"})<-[:IN_COUNTRY]-(ci:City)<-[:IN_CITY]-(o:Organization) WITH sum(o.revenue) AS totalRevenue RETURN totalRevenue
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:IN_CITY]->(m0:City)-[r1:IN_COUNTRY]->(m1:Country {name: 'United States'}) RETURN n, m0, m1 } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN sum(n.revenue)

question: List the top 5 actors with the most number of movie appearances.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:CAST_FOR]->(m:Movie) WITH p, count(*) AS movie_count ORDER BY movie_count DESC RETURN p.name, movie_count LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person) OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[r0:CAST_FOR]->(m0:Movie) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the 3 oldest filings based on the begin date.
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) RETURN f ORDER BY f.begin LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing) WITH DISTINCT n ORDER BY n.begin DESC RETURN n LIMIT 3

question: List the top 3 organizations that have a CEO and are mentioned in the latest articles.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_CEO]->(ceo:Person) MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o) WITH o, a ORDER BY a.date DESC WITH o, collect(a)[0] AS latest_article RETURN o.name AS organization, latest_article.title AS latest_article_title, latest_article.date AS latest_article_date ORDER BY latest_article_date DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:HAS_CEO]->(m0:Person),(n:Organization)-[r1:MENTIONS]->(m1:Article {id: 'ART176872705964'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.name DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the business addresses and their user reviews in 'Burlingame'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(:Category), (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b), (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r) WHERE b.city = 'Burlingame' RETURN b.address AS businessAddress, r.text AS reviewText, u.name AS userName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)-[r0:REVIEWS]->(m0:Review)<-[r1:WROTE]-(m1:User) WHERE n.city = 'Burlingame' WITH n, collect(DISTINCT r0.text) AS reviews RETURN n.address, reviews

question: What is the name of the genre associated with the movie "Jumanji"?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Genre)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Movie {name: 'Jumanji'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which movies have been most frequently rated by users?

question: Which 3 countries have the most cities with organizations based in them?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(co:Country) WITH co, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS cityCount ORDER BY cityCount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN co.name AS country, cityCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:City]-[r1:IN_CITY]->(m0:Organization) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 5 tweets by 'neo4j' with the most favorites.

gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.centrality = 0 RETURN c.name

question: What are the supplierIDs for suppliers who have provided products to more than three different cities?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:SUPPLIES]-(m0:Product)<-[r1:ORDERS]-(m1:Order) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m1.shipCity) AS num RETURN n.supplierID WHERE num > 3

question: Which 3 people born before 1950 acted in a movie with a tagline containing 'limits'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE p.born < 1950 AND m.tagline CONTAINS 'limits' RETURN p.name LIMIT 3

question: Identify the first 5 questions tagged with 'apollo' and have downVotes.

question: What are the top 5 movies with the most number of spoken languages?

question: What is the total revenue generated from each customer?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[or:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH c.customerID AS customerID, toFloat(or.quantity) * toFloat(or.unitPrice) AS orderRevenue WITH customerID, sum(orderRevenue) AS totalRevenue RETURN customerID, totalRevenue
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Customer)<-[r0:PURCHASED]-(m0:Order)-[r1:ORDERS]->(m1:Product) WITH n, sum(CAST(r1.unitPrice AS INTEGER) * r1.quantity) AS revenue RETURN n.customerID, revenue

question: List the first 3 countries where the beneficiary latitude is greater than 50 degrees.

question: Which characters have an INTERACTS relationship with a weight exactly 334?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c1:Character)-[r:INTERACTS]->(c2:Character) WHERE r.weight = 334 RETURN c1.name AS Character1, c2.name AS Character2
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:INTERACTS]->(m0:Character) WHERE r0.weight = 334 RETURN n, m0 } UNION ALL CALL { MATCH (n:Character)-[r1:INTERACTS1]->(m1:Character) WHERE r1.weight = 334 RETURN n, m1 } UNION ALL CALL { MATCH (n:Character)-[r2:INTERACTS2]->(m2:Character) WHERE r2.weight = 334 RETURN n, m2 } UNION ALL CALL { MATCH (n:Character)-[r3:INTERACTS3]->(m3:Character) WHERE r3.weight = 334 RETURN n, m3 } UNION ALL CALL { MATCH (n:Character)-[r4:INTERACTS45]->(m4:Character) WHERE r4.weight = 334 RETURN n, m4 } YIELD n, m RETURN DISTINCT n.name

question: List the top 5 most recent movies in the graph.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) RETURN m ORDER BY m.released DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.released DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the names of the games played by streams that have "en" as their language.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language {name: "en"}) MATCH (s)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) RETURN DISTINCT g.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Game)<-[r0:PLAYS]-(m0:Stream)-[r1:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(m1:Language {name: 'en'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the average number of competitors for organizations in the same industry category as 'Deis'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Organization {name: 'Deis'})-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(ic:IndustryCategory) WITH d, ic MATCH (other:Organization)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(ic) WHERE other <> d WITH other MATCH (other)-[:HAS_COMPETITOR]->(competitor) WITH other, count(competitor) AS numCompetitors RETURN avg(numCompetitors) AS averageCompetitors
pred_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:HAS_CATEGORY]->(m0:IndustryCategory {name: 'Deis'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Organization)-[r1:HAS_CATEGORY]->(m1:IndustryCategory {name: 'Deis'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.nbrEmployees)

question: "Which is the best rated movie"
gold_cypher: MATCH (:Person)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) RETURN m.title AS movie, r.rating AS rating ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:REVIEWED]-(m0:Person) WITH n, max(r0.rating) AS max RETURN n.title

question: Who are the characters with a fastrf_embedding value at the last position less than -0.5? Limit to 3 characters.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.fastrf_embedding[9] < -0.5 RETURN c.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.fastrf_embedding[9] < -0.5 RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: What are the top 5 keywords associated with the movie 'Waiting to Exhale'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie {title: 'Waiting to Exhale'})-[:HAS_KEYWORD]->(k:Keyword) RETURN k.name ORDER BY k.id LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Keyword)<-[r0:HAS_KEYWORD]-(m0:Movie {name: 'Waiting to Exhale'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many switches are connected to interfaces in zone 2?
gold_cypher: MATCH (z:Zone {zone: 2})-[:ROUTES]->(i:Interface)<-[:ROUTES]-(s:Switch) RETURN count(s) AS numberOfSwitches
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Switch)<-[r0:CONNECTS]-(m0:Interface)-[r1:ROUTES]->(m1:Zone {name: 'zone 2'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: Which countries have cities that are home to more than three organizations?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:City)<-[:IN_CITY]-(o:Organization) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS orgCount WHERE orgCount > 3 MATCH (c)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(country:Country) RETURN country.name AS Country, COUNT(c) AS CityCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:IN_COUNTRY]-(m0:City)<-[r1:IN_CITY]-(m1:Organization) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m1) AS num RETURN n.name WHERE num > 3

question: Which 3 movies have the most number of votes cast by users?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) RETURN m.title, m.imdbVotes ORDER BY m.imdbVotes DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n ORDER BY n.imdbVotes DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the characters who interacted with 'Aemon-Targaryen-(Dragonknight)' in 'INTERACTS' relationship.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character {name: 'Aemon-Targaryen-(Dragonknight)'})-[r:INTERACTS]-(other) RETURN other.name AS character_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)<-[r0:INTERACTS]-(m0:Character {name: 'Aemon-Targaryen-(Dragonknight)'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Find the top 3 articles that mention organizations based in 'Seattle'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(:City {name: 'Seattle'}) RETURN a.title AS article, a.siteName AS site, a.date AS published ORDER BY a.date DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Article)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Organization)-[r1:IN_CITY]->(m1:City {name: 'Seattle'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the top 5 highest revenue organizations in the database?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization) WHERE o.revenue IS NOT NULL RETURN o.name AS organization, o.revenue AS revenue ORDER BY o.revenue DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the names of the movies directed by persons born in 'Burchard, Nebraska, USA'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Director {bornIn: 'Burchard, Nebraska, USA'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) RETURN m.title AS MovieName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:DIRECTED]-(m0:Person {bornIn: 'Burchard, Nebraska, USA'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the first 3 genres associated with the video 'Jonah: A VeggieTales Movie'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (v:Video {title: 'Jonah: A VeggieTales Movie'})-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN g.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Genre)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Video {name: 'Jonah: A VeggieTales Movie'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: List the top 3 users with the lowest number of followers who follow 'Neo4j'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(m:Me {screen_name: 'neo4j'}) RETURN u ORDER BY u.followers ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:SIMILAR_TO]->(m0:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.followers ASC LIMIT 3

question: What are the first 3 racks that hold machines of type 'xl-16/256/625'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Type {name: 'xl-16/256/625'})<-[:TYPE]-(m:Machine)-[:HOLDS]-(r:Rack) RETURN r.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Rack)<-[r0: HOLDS]-(m0:Machine)-[r1:TYPE]->(m1:Type {name: 'xl-16/256/625'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name LIMIT 3

question: What are the top 5 countries with the most movies produced?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(c:Country) RETURN c.name AS Country, count(m) AS NumberOfMovies ORDER BY NumberOfMovies DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]-(m0:Movie) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which 3 entities have filed the most number of filings concerning banks in 'Australia'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing)-[:CONCERNS]->(b:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country {name: 'Australia'}) WITH e, COUNT(f) AS num_filings ORDER BY num_filings DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN e.name AS entity_name, num_filings
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:FILED]-(m0:Filing)-[r1:CONCERNS]->(m1:Entity {name: 'bank'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which teams are associated with more than three different streams?
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Team)<-[:HAS_TEAM]-(s:Stream) WITH t, count(distinct s) as num_streams WHERE num_streams > 3 RETURN t.name as team_name, num_streams
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Team)<-[r0:HAS_TEAM]-(m0:Stream) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name WHERE num > 3

question: Show all tweets that mention 'Neo4j' and contain a link.
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'}) WHERE exists{ (t)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link) } RETURN t
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)-[r0:MENTIONS]->(m0:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n:Tweet OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Tweet)-[r1:CONTAINS]->(m1:Link) RETURN n

question: "Which movies had more than 5 actors?"
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WITH m, count(p) AS actorCount WHERE actorCount > 5 RETURN m.title, actorCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Person) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.title WHERE num > 5

question: How many Entities share the same registered address as an entity with the service provider "Mossack Fonseca"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (entity1:Entity {service_provider: 'Mossack Fonseca'})-[:registered_address]->(address:Address) MATCH (address)<-[:registered_address]-(entity2:Entity) WITH DISTINCT entity2 RETURN count(entity2)
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)-[r0:registered_address]->(m0:Address)<-[r1:registered_address]-(m1:Entity) WHERE m1.service_provider = 'Mossack Fonseca' WITH n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: Which people have reviewed the same movie and what were their review summaries?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p1:Person)-[r1:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie)<-[r2:REVIEWED]-(p2:Person) WHERE p1 <> p2 RETURN p1.name AS Reviewer1, p2.name AS Reviewer2, m.title AS Movie, r1.summary AS Review1, r2.summary AS Review2
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)-[r0:REVIEWED]->(m0:Movie)<-[r1:REVIEWED]-(m1:Person) WITH DISTINCT n, r0.summary AS summary RETURN n.name, summary

question: List the 3 streams with the lowest follower count but with over 1 million total views.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE s.total_view_count > 1000000 RETURN s.name, s.followers, s.total_view_count ORDER BY s.followers ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.followers ASC LIMIT 3

question: Which organizations are mentioned in the most recent 5 articles by date?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WITH o, max(a.date) AS maxDate ORDER BY maxDate DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN o.name AS organization, maxDate AS latestMentionDate
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:MENTIONS]-(m0:Article) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many different users have reviewed 'KettleHouse Brewing Co.'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business {name: 'KettleHouse Brewing Co.'})<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review)<-[:WROTE]-(u:User) RETURN count(DISTINCT u) AS NumberOfUsers
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:WROTE]->(m0:Review)-[r1:REVIEWS]->(m1:Business {name: 'KettleHouse Brewing Co.'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: Which 3 suppliers provide products in the 'Dairy Products' category?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category {categoryName: 'Dairy Products'}) RETURN DISTINCT s.companyName LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:SUPPLIES]-(m0:Product)-[r1:PART_OF]->(m1:Category {name: 'Dairy Products'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: Which suppliers supply to more than one category?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH s, collect(DISTINCT c.categoryID) AS categories WHERE size(categories) > 1 RETURN s.companyName AS Supplier, categories
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:SUPPLIES]-(m0:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(m1:Category) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m1) AS num RETURN n.name WHERE num > 1

question: Which users with a reputation over 50000 asked questions that were later answered?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE u.reputation > 50000 AND q.answered = true RETURN u.display_name, u.reputation, q.title, q.link
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:ASKED]->(m0:Question)-[r1:ANSWERED]->(m1:Question) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.reputation > 50000 RETURN n.display_name

question: Which product (`productName`) has the highest difference between its `unitsInStock` and `reorderLevel`?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) WITH p, abs(p.unitsInStock - p.reorderLevel) AS stockDifference WITH max(stockDifference) AS maxDifference MATCH (p:Product) WHERE abs(p.unitsInStock - p.reorderLevel) = maxDifference RETURN p.productName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n.productName WHERE n.unitsInStock - n.reorderLevel IS NOT NULL ORDER BY n.unitsInStock - n.reorderLevel DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the top 5 products with the lowest units in stock.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) RETURN p.productName, p.unitsInStock ORDER BY p.unitsInStock ASC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product) RETURN n.productName, n.unitsInStock ORDER BY n.unitsInStock ASC LIMIT 5

question: List the users who follow Neo4j and have posted tweets using the source "Twitter Web App".
gold_cypher: MATCH (neo:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'}) MATCH (user:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(neo) MATCH (user)-[:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet)-[:USING]->(source:Source {name: 'Twitter Web App'}) RETURN DISTINCT user.screen_name AS usernames
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:FOLLOWS]->(m0:User {name: 'Neo4j'}),(n:User)-[r1:POSTS]->(m1:Tweet)-[r2:USING]->(m2:Source {name: 'Twitter Web App'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which 5 entities are most frequently listed as originators in filings from 2010 to 2015?
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(f:Filing) WHERE f.begin >= datetime('2010-01-01T00:00:00Z') AND f.end <= datetime('2015-12-31T23:59:59Z') RETURN e.name, count(f) AS filings_count ORDER BY filings_count DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:ORIGINATOR]-(m0:Filing) WHERE m0.begin >= date('2010-01-01') AND m0.begin <= date('2015-12-31') WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the first 3 streams that were created in 2018.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE s.createdAt >= datetime('2018-01-01') AND s.createdAt < datetime('2019-01-01') RETURN s ORDER BY s.createdAt LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 3 adult films that have been rated exactly 3 times.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Adult) WHERE count{(u:User)-[:RATED]->(a)} = 3 RETURN a ORDER BY a.average_vote DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Adult) WITH n RETURN DISTINCT n.title ORDER BY n.vote_count DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the first 5 users who wrote a review with a rating of 5 stars.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review {stars: 5}) RETURN u LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:WROTE]-(m0:Review)-[r1:REVIEWS]->(m1:Business) WHERE n.name IS NOT NULL AND m0.stars = 5 RETURN DISTINCT n.name ORDER BY n.name LIMIT 5

question: List the top 3 people who have the most credits as a producer.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:CREW_FOR]->(m:Movie) WHERE r.job = "Producer" RETURN p.name, COUNT(r) AS producer_credits ORDER BY producer_credits DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)-[r0:CREW_FOR]->(m0:Movie {name: 'The Avengers'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Person)-[r1:CREW_FOR]->(m1:Movie) WHERE r1.job = 'Producer' WITH n, count(DISTINCT m1) AS num RETURN n.name, num ORDER BY num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List all entities and their respective service providers that were inactivated on '18-FEB-2013'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.inactivation_date = '18-FEB-2013' RETURN e.name AS entity_name, e.service_provider AS service_provider
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity) WHERE n.inactivation_date = '18-FEB-2013' WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.service_provider

question: Who are three characters connected by an INTERACTS45 relationship in book 45?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)<-[r0:INTERACTS45]-(m0:Character {name: 'book45'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: What are the first 3 genres associated with the movie 'Father of the Bride Part II'?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Genre)<-[r0:IN_GENRE]-(m0:Movie {name: 'Father of the Bride Part II'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name LIMIT 3

question: Who are the top 3 characters with the highest weight in INTERACTS1 relationships?

question: List the first 5 streams that have a description mentioning 'channel'.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.description CONTAINS 'channel' RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name LIMIT 5

question: Which users followed by 'Neo4j' have posted tweets mentioning 'Neo4j'? Show the top 5.
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:User {name: 'Neo4j'})-[:FOLLOWS]->(u:User)-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(m:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) RETURN u.name AS UserName, count(t) AS TweetsCount ORDER BY TweetsCount DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:FOLLOWS]-(m0:User {name: 'Neo4j'}),(n:User)-[r1:POSTS]->(m1:Tweet)-[r2:MENTIONS]->(m2:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name LIMIT 5

question: List the orders that include the top 3 most expensive products.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) WITH p, toFloat(p.unitPrice) as price ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 3 WITH collect(p.productID) as productIds MATCH (o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE p.productID IN productIds RETURN DISTINCT o.orderID
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order)<-[r0:ORDERS]-(m0:Product) WITH n, m0 ORDER BY m0.unitPrice DESC RETURN DISTINCT n.orderID LIMIT 3

question: What are the names and locations of the top 3 entities that benefited from filings where the amount exceeded 500,000?
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity) WHERE f.amount > 500000 RETURN e.name AS EntityName, e.location AS Location ORDER BY f.amount DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which 3 production companies have produced the most movies in the genre 'Drama'?

question: "Can you trace the family tree of a specific person up to their great-grandparents using the HAS_PARENT relationship?"

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:HAS_PARENT]-(m0:Person)<-[r1:HAS_PARENT]-(m1:Person)<-[r2:HAS_PARENT]-(m2:Person) WITH n, m0, m1, m2 RETURN n.name, m0.name, m1.name, m2.name

question: Which 5 movies have the highest average user rating? Limit to movies rated by at least 10 users.
